authors_text: Yuxin Wang,Jieru Lin,Zhiwei Yu,Wei Hu,Börje F. Karlsson
title: Open-world Story Generation with Structured Knowledge Enhancement: A Comprehensive Survey
title_zh: 具有结构化知识增强的开放世界故事生成：综合调查
abstract: Storytelling and narrative are fundamental to human experience, intertwined with our social and cultural engagement. As such, researchers have long attempted to create systems that can generate stories automatically. In recent years, powered by deep learning and massive data resources, automatic story generation has shown significant advances. However, considerable challenges, like the need for global coherence in generated stories, still hamper generative models from reaching the same storytelling ability as human narrators. To tackle these challenges, many studies seek to inject structured knowledge into the generation process, which is referred to as structured knowledge-enhanced story generation. Incorporating external knowledge can enhance the logical coherence among story events, achieve better knowledge grounding, and alleviate over-generalization and repetition problems in stories. This survey provides the latest and comprehensive review of this research field: (i) we present a systematic taxonomy regarding how existing methods integrate structured knowledge into story generation; (ii) we summarize involved story corpora, structured knowledge datasets, and evaluation metrics; (iii) we give multidimensional insights into the challenges of knowledge-enhanced story generation and cast light on promising directions for future study.

To tackle these challenges, many studies seek to inject structured knowledge into the generation process, which is referred to as structured knowledge-enhanced story generation. Incorporating external knowledge can enhance the logical coherence among story events, achieve better knowledge grounding, and alleviate over-generalization and repetition problems in stories. This survey provides the latest and comprehensive review of this research field: (i) we present a systematic taxonomy regarding how existing methods integrate structured knowledge into story generation; (ii) we summarize involved story corpora, structured knowledge datasets, and evaluation metrics; (iii) we give multidimensional insights into the challenges of knowledge-enhanced story generation and cast light on promising directions for future study.
abstract_zh: 讲故事和叙述是人类经验的基础，与我们的社会和文化参与交织在一起。因此，研究人员长期以来一直试图创建可以自动生成故事的系统。近年来，在深度学习和海量数据资源的支持下，自动故事生成取得了显着的进步。然而，相当大的挑战，比如生成的故事需要全球一致性，仍然阻碍生成模型达到与人类叙述者相同的讲故事能力。为了应对这些挑战，许多研究试图将结构化知识注入生成过程，这被称为结构化知识增强的故事生成。融入外部知识可以增强故事事件之间的逻辑连贯性，实现更好的知识基础，缓解故事中的过度概括和重复问题。这项调查提供了该研究领域的最新且全面的回顾：（i）我们提出了一个关于现有方法如何将结构化知识整合到故事生成中的系统分类法； (ii)我们总结了所涉及的故事语料库、结构化知识数据集和评估指标； （iii）我们对知识增强的故事生成的挑战提供了多维的见解，并为未来的研究指明了有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了结合结构化知识增强的开放世界故事生成方法，分析其挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有故事生成模型在全局连贯性和知识 grounding 方面存在不足，需通过结构化知识注入提升生成质量。
AI.method: 提出系统分类框架，总结故事语料库、知识数据集及评估指标，分析知识增强生成的多维挑战。
AI.result: 梳理了知识增强故事生成的主流方法，归纳了数据资源与评价体系，指出现有技术瓶颈与研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识能有效提升故事逻辑性，未来需探索开放世界场景下的知识动态融合与生成可控性问题。

authors_text: Wei Chen,Xi Jia,Zhongqun Zhang,Hyung Jin Chang,Linlin Shen,Jinming Duan,Ales Leonardis
title: Category-Level 6D Object Pose Estimation with Flexible Vector-Based Rotation Representation
title_zh: 具有灵活的基于矢量的旋转表示的类别级 6D 物体姿态估计
comment: revised from CVPR2021 paper FS-NET. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.07054
comments: revised from CVPR2021 paper FS-NET. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.07054
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel 3D graph convolution based pipeline for category-level 6D pose and size estimation from monocular RGB-D images. The proposed method leverages an efficient 3D data augmentation and a novel vector-based decoupled rotation representation. Specifically, we first design an orientation-aware autoencoder with 3D graph convolution for latent feature learning. The learned latent feature is insensitive to point shift and size thanks to the shift and scale-invariance properties of the 3D graph convolution. Then, to efficiently decode the rotation information from the latent feature, we design a novel flexible vector-based decomposable rotation representation that employs two decoders to complementarily access the rotation information. The proposed rotation representation has two major advantages: 1) decoupled characteristic that makes the rotation estimation easier; 2) flexible length and rotated angle of the vectors allow us to find a more suitable vector representation for specific pose estimation task. Finally, we propose a 3D deformation mechanism to increase the generalization ability of the pipeline. Extensive experiments show that the proposed pipeline achieves state-of-the-art performance on category-level tasks. Further, the experiments demonstrate that the proposed rotation representation is more suitable for the pose estimation tasks than other rotation representations.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel 3D graph convolution based pipeline for category-level 6D pose and size estimation from monocular RGB-D images. The proposed method leverages an efficient 3D data augmentation and a novel vector-based decoupled rotation representation. Specifically, we first design an orientation-aware autoencoder with 3D graph convolution for latent feature learning. The learned latent feature is insensitive to point shift and size thanks to the shift and scale-invariance properties of the 3D graph convolution. Then, to efficiently decode the rotation information from the latent feature, we design a novel flexible vector-based decomposable rotation representation that employs two decoders to complementarily access the rotation information. The proposed rotation representation has two major advantages: 1) decoupled characteristic that makes the rotation estimation easier; 2) flexible length and rotated angle of the vectors allow us to find a more suitable vector representation for specific pose estimation task. Finally, we propose a 3D deformation mechanism to increase the generalization ability of the pipeline. Extensive experiments show that the proposed pipeline achieves state-of-the-art performance on category-level tasks. Further, the experiments demonstrate that the proposed rotation representation is more suitable for the pose estimation tasks than other rotation representations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 3D 图卷积的管道，用于单目 RGB-D 图像的类别级 6D 姿态和大小估计。所提出的方法利用高效的 3D 数据增强和新颖的基于矢量的解耦旋转表示。具体来说，我们首先设计一个具有 3D 图卷积的方向感知自动编码器，用于潜在特征学习。由于 3D 图卷积的平移和尺度不变性，学习到的潜在特征对点平移和大小不敏感。然后，为了有效地从潜在特征中解码旋转信息，我们设计了一种新颖的灵活的基于向量的可分解旋转表示，它采用两个解码器来互补地访问旋转信息。所提出的旋转表示有两个主要优点：1）解耦特性使旋转估计更容易； 2）矢量的灵活长度和旋转角度使我们能够为特定的姿态估计任务找到更合适的矢量表示。最后，我们提出了一种3D变形机制来提高管道的泛化能力。大量的实验表明，所提出的管道在类别级任务上实现了最先进的性能。此外，实验表明，所提出的旋转表示比其他旋转表示更适合姿态估计任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D图卷积的新型流水线，用于从单目RGB-D图像中进行类别级6D物体姿态和尺寸估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理类别级物体姿态估计时存在旋转表示不够灵活、对尺度和位移敏感的问题，需提升模型的泛化能力和估计精度。
AI.method: 设计了具有位姿感知能力的3D图卷积自编码器学习不变特征，采用向量解耦旋转表示法通过双解码器互补提取旋转信息，并引入3D形变机制增强泛化能力。
AI.result: 在类别级任务中达到SOTA性能，实验表明所提旋转表示法优于其他旋转表示方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活的向量旋转表示和3D图卷积特征学习，有效解决了类别级姿态估计中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Bo Hu,Jose C. Principe
title: The Normalized Cross Density Functional: A Framework to Quantify Statistical Dependence for Random Processes
title_zh: 归一化交叉密度泛函：量化随机过程统计依赖性的框架
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to measuring statistical dependence between two random processes (r.p.) using a positive-definite function called the Normalized Cross Density (NCD). NCD is derived directly from the probability density functions of two r.p. and constructs a data-dependent Hilbert space, the Normalized Cross-Density Hilbert Space (NCD-HS). By Mercer's Theorem, the NCD norm can be decomposed into its eigenspectrum, which we name the Multivariate Statistical Dependence (MSD) measure, and their sum, the Total Dependence Measure (TSD). Hence, the NCD-HS eigenfunctions serve as a novel embedded feature space, suitable for quantifying r.p. statistical dependence. In order to apply NCD directly to r.p. realizations, we introduce an architecture with two multiple-output neural networks, a cost function, and an algorithm named the Functional Maximal Correlation Algorithm (FMCA). With FMCA, the two networks learn concurrently by approximating each other's outputs, extending the Alternating Conditional Expectation (ACE) for multivariate functions. We mathematically prove that FMCA learns the dominant eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of NCD directly from realizations. Preliminary results with synthetic data and medium-sized image datasets corroborate the theory. Different strategies for applying NCD are proposed and discussed, demonstrating the method's versatility and stability beyond supervised learning. Specifically, when the two r.p. are high-dimensional real-world images and a white uniform noise process, FMCA learns factorial codes, i.e., the occurrence of a code guarantees that a specific training set image was present, which is important for feature learning.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to measuring statistical dependence between two random processes (r.p.) using a positive-definite function called the Normalized Cross Density (NCD). NCD is derived directly from the probability density functions of two r.p. and constructs a data-dependent Hilbert space, the Normalized Cross-Density Hilbert Space (NCD-HS). By Mercer's Theorem, the NCD norm can be decomposed into its eigenspectrum, which we name the Multivariate Statistical Dependence (MSD) measure, and their sum, the Total Dependence Measure (TSD). Hence, the NCD-HS eigenfunctions serve as a novel embedded feature space, suitable for quantifying r.p. statistical dependence. In order to apply NCD directly to r.p. realizations, we introduce an architecture with two multiple-output neural networks, a cost function, and an algorithm named the Functional Maximal Correlation Algorithm (FMCA). With FMCA, the two networks learn concurrently by approximating each other's outputs, extending the Alternating Conditional Expectation (ACE) for multivariate functions. We mathematically prove that FMCA learns the dominant eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of NCD directly from realizations. Preliminary results with synthetic data and medium-sized image datasets corroborate the theory. Different strategies for applying NCD are proposed and discussed, demonstrating the method's versatility and stability beyond supervised learning. Specifically, when the two r.p. are high-dimensional real-world images and a white uniform noise process, FMCA learns factorial codes, i.e., the occurrence of a code guarantees that a specific training set image was present, which is important for feature learning.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用称为归一化交叉密度 (NCD) 的正定函数来测量两个随机过程 (r.p.) 之间统计依赖性的新方法。 NCD 直接从两个 r.p. 的概率密度函数导出。并构造一个数据相关的希尔伯特空间，即归一化交叉密度希尔伯特空间（NCD-HS）。根据默瑟定理，NCD 范数可以分解为其特征谱，我们将其称为多元统计依赖性 (MSD) 测度，以及它们的总和，即总依赖性测度 (TSD)。因此，NCD-HS 特征函数作为一种新颖的嵌入式特征空间，适合量化 r.p。统计依赖性。为了将 NCD 直接应用于 r.p.为了实现这一点，我们引入了一种具有两个多输出神经网络、一个成本函数和一种名为函数最大相关算法（FMCA）的架构。通过 FMCA，两个网络通过逼近彼此的输出来同时学习，从而扩展了多元函数的交替条件期望 (ACE)。我们在数学上证明 FMCA 直接从实现中学习 NCD 的主要特征值和特征函数。合成数据和中等规模图像数据集的初步结果证实了该理论。提出并讨论了应用 NCD 的不同策略，证明了该方法超越监督学习的多功能性和稳定性。具体来说，当两个 r.p.是高维真实世界图像和均匀白噪声过程，FMCA 学习阶乘代码，即代码的出现保证存在特定的训练集图像，这对于特征学习很重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为归一化交叉密度（NCD）的新方法，用于量化随机过程间的统计依赖性，并通过功能最大相关算法（FMCA）实现其在实际数据中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高维随机过程的统计依赖性时存在局限性，需开发一种更通用且稳定的框架以适应复杂数据场景。
AI.method: 基于概率密度函数构建NCD及其对应的希尔伯特空间（NCD-HS），利用Mercer定理分解为多变量统计依赖（MSD）和总依赖度量（TSD）。设计FMCA架构，通过双输出神经网络和自定义损失函数学习NCD的主特征值与特征函数。
AI.result: 在合成数据和中等规模图像数据集上验证了理论有效性，证明FMCA能从高维图像与白噪声中学习到因子编码，体现方法的稳定性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: NCD框架及FMCA算法为量化随机过程统计依赖性提供了新思路，其在无监督特征学习中的表现验证了方法的实用性与扩展性。

search_text: The Normalized Cross Density Functional: A Framework to Quantify Statistical Dependence for Random Processes 归一化交叉密度泛函：量化随机过程统计依赖性的框架 This paper presents a novel approach to measuring statistical dependence between two random processes (r.p.) using a positive-definite function called the Normalized Cross Density (NCD). NCD is derived directly from the probability density functions of two r.p. and constructs a data-dependent Hilbert space, the Normalized Cross-Density Hilbert Space (NCD-HS). By Mercer's Theorem, the NCD norm can be decomposed into its eigenspectrum, which we name the Multivariate Statistical Dependence (MSD) measure, and their sum, the Total Dependence Measure (TSD). Hence, the NCD-HS eigenfunctions serve as a novel embedded feature space, suitable for quantifying r.p. statistical dependence. In order to apply NCD directly to r.p. realizations, we introduce an architecture with two multiple-output neural networks, a cost function, and an algorithm named the Functional Maximal Correlation Algorithm (FMCA). With FMCA, the two networks learn concurrently by approximating each other's outputs, extending the Alternating Conditional Expectation (ACE) for multivariate functions. We mathematically prove that FMCA learns the dominant eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of NCD directly from realizations. Preliminary results with synthetic data and medium-sized image datasets corroborate the theory. Different strategies for applying NCD are proposed and discussed, demonstrating the method's versatility and stability beyond supervised learning. Specifically, when the two r.p. are high-dimensional real-world images and a white uniform noise process, FMCA learns factorial codes, i.e., the occurrence of a code guarantees that a specific training set image was present, which is important for feature learning. 本文提出了一种使用称为归一化交叉密度 (NCD) 的正定函数来测量两个随机过程 (r.p.) 之间统计依赖性的新方法。 NCD 直接从两个 r.p. 的概率密度函数导出。并构造一个数据相关的希尔伯特空间，即归一化交叉密度希尔伯特空间（NCD-HS）。根据默瑟定理，NCD 范数可以分解为其特征谱，我们将其称为多元统计依赖性 (MSD) 测度，以及它们的总和，即总依赖性测度 (TSD)。因此，NCD-HS 特征函数作为一种新颖的嵌入式特征空间，适合量化 r.p。统计依赖性。为了将 NCD 直接应用于 r.p.为了实现这一点，我们引入了一种具有两个多输出神经网络、一个成本函数和一种名为函数最大相关算法（FMCA）的架构。通过 FMCA，两个网络通过逼近彼此的输出来同时学习，从而扩展了多元函数的交替条件期望 (ACE)。我们在数学上证明 FMCA 直接从实现中学习 NCD 的主要特征值和特征函数。合成数据和中等规模图像数据集的初步结果证实了该理论。提出并讨论了应用 NCD 的不同策略，证明了该方法超越监督学习的多功能性和稳定性。具体来说，当两个 r.p.是高维真实世界图像和均匀白噪声过程，FMCA 学习阶乘代码，即代码的出现保证存在特定的训练集图像，这对于特征学习很重要。 本文提出了一种名为归一化交叉密度（NCD）的新方法，用于量化随机过程间的统计依赖性，并通过功能最大相关算法（FMCA）实现其在实际数据中的应用。 Bo Hu,Jose C. authors_text: Vedant Mundheda,Karan Mirakhor,Rahul K S,Harikumar Kandath,Nagamanikandan Govindan
title: Predictive Barrier Lyapunov Function Based Control for Safe Trajectory Tracking of an Aerial Manipulator
title_zh: 基于预测障碍李亚普诺夫函数的空中机械臂安全轨迹跟踪控制
abstract: This paper proposes a novel controller framework that provides trajectory tracking for an Aerial Manipulator (AM) while ensuring the safe operation of the system under unknown bounded disturbances. The AM considered here is a 2-DOF (degrees-of-freedom) manipulator rigidly attached to a UAV. Our proposed controller structure follows the conventional inner loop PID control for attitude dynamics and an outer loop controller for tracking a reference trajectory. The outer loop control is based on the Model Predictive Control (MPC) with constraints derived using the Barrier Lyapunov Function (BLF) for the safe operation of the AM. BLF-based constraints are proposed for two objectives, viz. 1) To avoid the AM from colliding with static obstacles like a rectangular wall, and 2) To maintain the end effector of the manipulator within the desired workspace. The proposed BLF ensures that the above-mentioned objectives are satisfied even in the presence of unknown bounded disturbances. The capabilities of the proposed controller are demonstrated through high-fidelity non-linear simulations with parameters derived from a real laboratory scale AM. We compare the performance of our controller with other state-of-the-art MPC controllers for AM.
summary: This paper proposes a novel controller framework that provides trajectory tracking for an Aerial Manipulator (AM) while ensuring the safe operation of the system under unknown bounded disturbances. The AM considered here is a 2-DOF (degrees-of-freedom) manipulator rigidly attached to a UAV. Our proposed controller structure follows the conventional inner loop PID control for attitude dynamics and an outer loop controller for tracking a reference trajectory. The outer loop control is based on the Model Predictive Control (MPC) with constraints derived using the Barrier Lyapunov Function (BLF) for the safe operation of the AM. BLF-based constraints are proposed for two objectives, viz. 1) To avoid the AM from colliding with static obstacles like a rectangular wall, and 2) To maintain the end effector of the manipulator within the desired workspace. The proposed BLF ensures that the above-mentioned objectives are satisfied even in the presence of unknown bounded disturbances. The capabilities of the proposed controller are demonstrated through high-fidelity non-linear simulations with parameters derived from a real laboratory scale AM. We compare the performance of our controller with other state-of-the-art MPC controllers for AM.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的控制器框架，为空中机械手（AM）提供轨迹跟踪，同时确保系统在未知有界干扰下安全运行。这里考虑的 AM 是一个刚性连接到无人机的 2-DOF（自由度）操纵器。我们提出的控制器结构遵循传统的用于姿态动力学的内环 PID 控制和用于跟踪参考轨迹的外环控制器。外环控制基于模型预测控制 (MPC)，并使用 Barrier Lyapunov 函数 (BLF) 导出约束，以确保 AM 的安全运行。基于 BLF 的约束被提出用于两个目标，即。 1) 避免增材制造与矩形墙等静态障碍物碰撞，2) 将机械手的末端执行器保持在所需的工作空间内。所提出的 BLF 确保即使在存在未知有界干扰的情况下也能满足上述目标。所提出的控制器的功能通过高保真度非线性仿真以及源自真实实验室规模增材制造的参数来证明。我们将控制器的性能与其他最先进的增材制造 MPC 控制器进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测屏障李雅普诺夫函数（BLF）的控制框架，用于确保空中机械臂在未知有界干扰下的安全轨迹跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机械臂控制器难以在未知干扰下同时保证轨迹跟踪精度与系统安全，需解决碰撞避障与末端执行器工作空间约束问题。
AI.method: 采用双环控制结构：内环使用PID控制飞行器姿态，外环基于BLF约束的模型预测控制（MPC）实现轨迹跟踪，通过BLF约束避免碰撞并维持末端执行器在安全工作空间内。
AI.result: 高保真非线性仿真验证了控制器有效性，即使存在未知干扰也能满足安全约束，且性能优于其他先进MPC控制器。
AI.conclusion: BLF约束的MPC方法有效解决了空中机械臂的安全轨迹跟踪问题，为复杂环境下的自主控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Wei-tian Wu,Xin-min Yang
title: The Hybridization of Branch and Bound with Metaheuristics for Nonconvex Multiobjective Optimization
title_zh: 分支定界法与元启发法的混合用于非凸多目标优化
abstract: A hybrid framework combining the branch and bound method with multiobjective evolutionary algorithms is proposed for nonconvex multiobjective optimization. The hybridization exploits the complementary character of the two optimization strategies. A multiobjective evolutionary algorithm is intended for inducing tight lower and upper bounds during the branch and bound procedure. Tight bounds such as the ones derived in this way can reduce the number of subproblems that have to be solved. The branch and bound method guarantees the global convergence of the framework and improves the search capability of the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm. An implementation of the hybrid framework considering NSGA-II and MOEA/D-DE as multiobjective evolutionary algorithms is presented. Numerical experiments verify the hybrid algorithms benefit from synergy of the branch and bound method and multiobjective evolutionary algorithms.
summary: A hybrid framework combining the branch and bound method with multiobjective evolutionary algorithms is proposed for nonconvex multiobjective optimization. The hybridization exploits the complementary character of the two optimization strategies. A multiobjective evolutionary algorithm is intended for inducing tight lower and upper bounds during the branch and bound procedure. Tight bounds such as the ones derived in this way can reduce the number of subproblems that have to be solved. The branch and bound method guarantees the global convergence of the framework and improves the search capability of the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm. An implementation of the hybrid framework considering NSGA-II and MOEA/D-DE as multiobjective evolutionary algorithms is presented. Numerical experiments verify the hybrid algorithms benefit from synergy of the branch and bound method and multiobjective evolutionary algorithms.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种将分支定界法与多目标进化算法相结合的混合框架，用于非凸多目标优化。混合利用了两种优化策略的互补特性。多目标进化算法旨在在分支定界过程中引入严格的下限和上限。像这样导出的紧边界可以减少必须解决的子问题的数量。分支定界方法保证了框架的全局收敛性，提高了多目标进化算法的搜索能力。提出了一种将 NSGA-II 和 MOEA/D-DE 作为多目标进化算法的混合框架的实现。数值实验验证了混合算法受益于分支定界法和多目标进化算法的协同作用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合分支定界法与多目标进化算法的混合框架，用于解决非凸多目标优化问题，以提升求解效率与全局收敛性。
AI.motivation: 解决非凸多目标优化问题中传统方法收敛性差或效率低的问题，通过结合分支定界法的全局收敛性与多目标进化算法的搜索能力，提升优化效果。
AI.method: 设计一种混合框架，将多目标进化算法与分支定界法结合，利用进化算法生成紧致上下界以减少子问题数量，同时通过分支定界保证全局收敛。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，混合算法通过分支定界与多目标进化算法的协同作用，有效提升了求解效率和解的质量。
AI.conclusion: 混合框架有效结合了分支定界法和多目标进化算法的优势，为非凸多目标优化问题提供了更高效、可靠的解决方案。

search_text: The Hybridization of Branch and Bound with Metaheuristics for Nonconvex Multiobjective Optimization 分支定界法与元启发法的混合用于非凸多目标优化 A hybrid framework combining the branch and bound method with multiobjective evolutionary algorithms is proposed for nonconvex multiobjective optimization. The hybridization exploits the complementary character of the two optimization strategies. A multiobjective evolutionary algorithm is intended for inducing tight lower and upper bounds during the branch and bound procedure. Tight bounds such as the ones derived in this way can reduce the number of subproblems that have to be solved. The branch and bound method guarantees the global convergence of the framework and improves the search capability of the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm. An implementation of the hybrid framework considering NSGA-II and MOEA/D-DE as multiobjective evolutionary algorithms is presented. Numerical experiments verify the hybrid algorithms benefit from synergy of the branch and bound method and multiobjective evolutionary algorithms. 提出了一种将分支定界法与多目标进化算法相结合的混合框架，用于非凸多目标优化。混合利用了两种优化策略的互补特性。多目标进化算法旨在在分支定界过程中引入严格的下限和上限。像这样导出的紧边界可以减少必须解决的子问题的数量。分支定界方法保证了框架的全局收敛性，提高了多目标进化算法的搜索能力。提出了一种将 NSGA-II 和 MOEA/D-DE 作为多目标进化算法的混合框架的实现。数值实验验证了混合算法受益于分支定界法和多目标进化算法的协同作用。 提出一种结合分支定界法与多目标进化算法的混合框架，用于解决非凸多目标优化问题，以提升求解效率与全局收敛性。 Wei-tian Wu,Xin-min Yang math.OC,cs.NE

authors_text: Yan Qin,Anushiya Arunan,Chau Yuen
title: Digital Twin for Real-time Li-ion Battery State of Health Estimation with Partially Discharged Cycling Data
title_zh: 利用部分放电循环数据实时估计锂离子电池健康状态的数字孪生
comment: This paper has been accepted for IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics
comments: This paper has been accepted for IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics
abstract: To meet the fairly high safety and reliability requirements in practice, the state of health (SOH) estimation of Lithium-ion batteries (LIBs), which has a close relationship with the degradation performance, has been extensively studied with the widespread applications of various electronics. The conventional SOH estimation approaches with digital twin are end-of-cycle estimation that require the completion of a full charge/discharge cycle to observe the maximum available capacity. However, under dynamic operating conditions with partially discharged data, it is impossible to sense accurate real-time SOH estimation for LIBs. To bridge this research gap, we put forward a digital twin framework to gain the capability of sensing the battery's SOH on the fly, updating the physical battery model. The proposed digital twin solution consists of three core components to enable real-time SOH estimation without requiring a complete discharge. First, to handle the variable training cycling data, the energy discrepancy-aware cycling synchronization is proposed to align cycling data with guaranteeing the same data structure. Second, to explore the temporal importance of different training sampling times, a time-attention SOH estimation model is developed with data encoding to capture the degradation behavior over cycles, excluding adverse influences of unimportant samples. Finally, for online implementation, a similarity analysis-based data reconstruction has been put forward to provide real-time SOH estimation without requiring a full discharge cycle. Through a series of results conducted on a widely used benchmark, the proposed method yields the real-time SOH estimation with errors less than 1% for most sampling times in ongoing cycles.
summary: To meet the fairly high safety and reliability requirements in practice, the state of health (SOH) estimation of Lithium-ion batteries (LIBs), which has a close relationship with the degradation performance, has been extensively studied with the widespread applications of various electronics. The conventional SOH estimation approaches with digital twin are end-of-cycle estimation that require the completion of a full charge/discharge cycle to observe the maximum available capacity. However, under dynamic operating conditions with partially discharged data, it is impossible to sense accurate real-time SOH estimation for LIBs. To bridge this research gap, we put forward a digital twin framework to gain the capability of sensing the battery's SOH on the fly, updating the physical battery model. The proposed digital twin solution consists of three core components to enable real-time SOH estimation without requiring a complete discharge. First, to handle the variable training cycling data, the energy discrepancy-aware cycling synchronization is proposed to align cycling data with guaranteeing the same data structure. Second, to explore the temporal importance of different training sampling times, a time-attention SOH estimation model is developed with data encoding to capture the degradation behavior over cycles, excluding adverse influences of unimportant samples. Finally, for online implementation, a similarity analysis-based data reconstruction has been put forward to provide real-time SOH estimation without requiring a full discharge cycle. Through a series of results conducted on a widely used benchmark, the proposed method yields the real-time SOH estimation with errors less than 1% for most sampling times in ongoing cycles.
abstract_zh: 为了满足实践中较高的安全性和可靠性要求，随着各种电子产品的广泛应用，与退化性能密切相关的锂离子电池（LIB）的健康状态（SOH）评估得到了广泛的研究。使用数字孪生的传统 SOH 估计方法是周期结束估计，需要完成完整的充电/放电周期才能观察最大可用容量。然而，在具有部分放电数据的动态操作条件下，不可能对 LIB 进行准确的实时 SOH 估计。为了弥补这一研究差距，我们提出了一个数字孪生框架，以获得动态感测电池 SOH 的能力，从而更新物理电池模型。所提出的数字孪生解决方案由三个核心组件组成，可实现实时 SOH 估算，而无需完全放电。首先，为了处理可变的训练循环数据，提出了能量差异感知循环同步，以在保证相同数据结构的情况下对齐循环数据。其次，为了探索不同训练采样时间的时间重要性，利用数据编码开发了时间关注 SOH 估计模型，以捕获周期内的退化行为，排除不重要样本的不利影响。最后，对于在线实施，提出了基于相似性分析的数据重建，以提供实时 SOH 估计，而不需要完整的放电周期。通过在广泛使用的基准上进行的一系列结果，所提出的方法产生了实时 SOH 估计，对于正在进行的周期中的大多数采样时间，误差小于 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生的实时锂离子电池健康状态（SOH）估计框架，无需完整充放电循环即可处理部分放电数据。
AI.motivation: 传统数字孪生方法需完成完整充放电周期才能估计SOH，在动态工况下无法实时获取准确数据，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 提出包含三个核心组件的数字孪生框架：1) 能量差异感知的循环同步技术；2) 时序注意力SOH估计模型；3) 基于相似性分析的数据重构方法。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的基准数据集上验证，大多数采样时刻的实时SOH估计误差低于1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数字孪生框架实现了无需完整放电的实时SOH估计，有效解决了动态工况下的精度问题。

authors_text: Shashank Shekhar,Ritika Nandi,H Srikanth Kamath
title: UNet Based Pipeline for Lung Segmentation from Chest X-Ray Images
title_zh: 基于 UNet 的胸部 X 射线图像肺分割管道
abstract: Biomedical image segmentation is one of the fastest growing fields which has seen extensive automation through the use of Artificial Intelligence. This has enabled widespread adoption of accurate techniques to expedite the screening and diagnostic processes which would otherwise take several days to finalize. In this paper, we present an end-to-end pipeline to segment lungs from chest X-ray images, training the neural network model on the Japanese Society of Radiological Technology (JSRT) dataset, using UNet to enable faster processing of initial screening for various lung disorders. The pipeline developed can be readily used by medical centers with just the provision of X-Ray images as input. The model will perform the preprocessing, and provide a segmented image as the final output. It is expected that this will drastically reduce the manual effort involved and lead to greater accessibility in resource-constrained locations.
summary: Biomedical image segmentation is one of the fastest growing fields which has seen extensive automation through the use of Artificial Intelligence. This has enabled widespread adoption of accurate techniques to expedite the screening and diagnostic processes which would otherwise take several days to finalize. In this paper, we present an end-to-end pipeline to segment lungs from chest X-ray images, training the neural network model on the Japanese Society of Radiological Technology (JSRT) dataset, using UNet to enable faster processing of initial screening for various lung disorders. The pipeline developed can be readily used by medical centers with just the provision of X-Ray images as input. The model will perform the preprocessing, and provide a segmented image as the final output. It is expected that this will drastically reduce the manual effort involved and lead to greater accessibility in resource-constrained locations.
abstract_zh: 生物医学图像分割是发展最快的领域之一，通过人工智能的使用已经实现了广泛的自动化。这使得准确的技术得以广泛采用，以加快筛查和诊断过程，否则需要几天的时间才能完成。在本文中，我们提出了一种从胸部 X 射线图像分割肺部的端到端管道，在日本放射技术学会 (JSRT) 数据集上训练神经网络模型，使用 UNet 更快地处理各种肺部疾病的初始筛查。医疗中心只需提供 X 射线图像作为输入即可轻松使用开发的管道。该模型将执行预处理，并提供分割图像作为最终输出。预计这将大大减少所涉及的手动工作，并在资源有限的地区提高可访问性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于UNet的端到端肺部分割管道，用于从胸部X光图像中自动分割肺部区域。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割领域需要更高效的自动化方法以减少人工处理时间，特别是在资源有限的地区，快速筛查肺部疾病具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用UNet神经网络模型，在JSRT数据集上训练，构建包含预处理和分割的端到端管道，输入胸部X光图像后输出分割结果。
AI.result: 该管道能够有效分割肺部区域，显著降低人工操作需求，提升医疗中心的筛查效率和可及性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了基于深度学习的肺部分割方法在资源受限环境中的可行性，为后续肺部疾病筛查提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 该管道能够有效分割肺部区域，显著降低人工操作需求，提升医疗中心的筛查效率和可及性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本研究验证了基于深度学习的肺部分割方法在资源受限环境中的可行性，为后续肺部疾病筛查提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: UNet Based Pipeline for Lung Segmentation from Chest X-Ray Images 基于 UNet 的胸部 X 射线图像肺分割管道 Biomedical image segmentation is one of the fastest growing fields which has seen extensive automation through the use of Artificial Intelligence. This has enabled widespread adoption of accurate techniques to expedite the screening and diagnostic processes which would otherwise take several days to finalize. In this paper, we present an end-to-end pipeline to segment lungs from chest X-ray images, training the neural network model on the Japanese Society of Radiological Technology (JSRT) dataset, using UNet to enable faster processing of initial screening for various lung disorders. The pipeline developed can be readily used by medical centers with just the provision of X-Ray images as input. The model will perform the preprocessing, and provide a segmented image as the final output. It is expected that this will drastically reduce the manual effort involved and lead to greater accessibility in resource-constrained locations. 生物医学图像分割是发展最快的领域之一，通过人工智能的使用已经实现了广泛的自动化。这使得准确的技术得以广泛采用，以加快筛查和诊断过程，否则需要几天的时间才能完成。在本文中，我们提出了一种从胸部 X 射线图像分割肺部的端到端管道，在日本放射技术学会 (JSRT) 数据集上训练神经网络模型，使用 UNet 更快地处理各种肺部疾病的初始筛查。医疗中心只需提供 X 射线图像作为输入即可轻松使用开发的管道。该模型将执行预处理，并提供分割图像作为最终输出。预计这将大大减少所涉及的手动工作，并在资源有限的地区提高可访问性。 本文提出了一种基于UNet的端到端肺部分割管道，用于从胸部X光图像中自动分割肺部区域。 Shashank Shekhar,Ritika Nandi,H Srikanth Kamath eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kyle Buettner,Adriana Kovashka
title: Contrastive View Design Strategies to Enhance Robustness to Domain Shifts in Downstream Object Detection
title_zh: 增强下游目标检测中域转移鲁棒性的对比视图设计策略
comment: To appear, 2nd International Workshop on Practical Deep Learning in the Wild at AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2023
comments: To appear, 2nd International Workshop on Practical Deep Learning in the Wild at AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2023
abstract: Contrastive learning has emerged as a competitive pretraining method for object detection. Despite this progress, there has been minimal investigation into the robustness of contrastively pretrained detectors when faced with domain shifts. To address this gap, we conduct an empirical study of contrastive learning and out-of-domain object detection, studying how contrastive view design affects robustness. In particular, we perform a case study of the detection-focused pretext task Instance Localization (InsLoc) and propose strategies to augment views and enhance robustness in appearance-shifted and context-shifted scenarios. Amongst these strategies, we propose changes to cropping such as altering the percentage used, adding IoU constraints, and integrating saliency based object priors. We also explore the addition of shortcut-reducing augmentations such as Poisson blending, texture flattening, and elastic deformation. We benchmark these strategies on abstract, weather, and context domain shifts and illustrate robust ways to combine them, in both pretraining on single-object and multi-object image datasets. Overall, our results and insights show how to ensure robustness through the choice of views in contrastive learning.
summary: Contrastive learning has emerged as a competitive pretraining method for object detection. Despite this progress, there has been minimal investigation into the robustness of contrastively pretrained detectors when faced with domain shifts. To address this gap, we conduct an empirical study of contrastive learning and out-of-domain object detection, studying how contrastive view design affects robustness. In particular, we perform a case study of the detection-focused pretext task Instance Localization (InsLoc) and propose strategies to augment views and enhance robustness in appearance-shifted and context-shifted scenarios. Amongst these strategies, we propose changes to cropping such as altering the percentage used, adding IoU constraints, and integrating saliency based object priors. We also explore the addition of shortcut-reducing augmentations such as Poisson blending, texture flattening, and elastic deformation. We benchmark these strategies on abstract, weather, and context domain shifts and illustrate robust ways to combine them, in both pretraining on single-object and multi-object image datasets. Overall, our results and insights show how to ensure robustness through the choice of views in contrastive learning.
abstract_zh: 对比学习已成为一种用于目标检测的竞争性预训练方法。尽管取得了这些进展，但对对比预训练检测器在面对域转移时的鲁棒性的研究却很少。为了解决这一差距，我们对对比学习和域外对象检测进行了实证研究，研究对比视图设计如何影响鲁棒性。特别是，我们对以检测为中心的借口任务实例本地化（InsLoc）进行了案例研究，并提出了在外观转移和上下文转移场景中增强视图和鲁棒性的策略。在这些策略中，我们建议对裁剪进行更改，例如更改使用的百分比、添加 IoU 约束以及集成基于显着性的对象先验。我们还探索了增加捷径减少增强功能，例如泊松混合、纹理扁平化和弹性变形。我们在抽象、天气和上下文域变化上对这些策略进行了基准测试，并说明了在单对象和多对象图像数据集的预训练中将它们结合起来的稳健方法。总的来说，我们的结果和见解展示了如何通过对比学习中的视图选择来确保稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对比学习在目标检测中的预训练方法，通过设计对比视图策略提升模型对领域偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管对比学习在目标检测预训练中表现优异，但其在面对领域偏移时的鲁棒性缺乏系统研究，现有方法对此关注不足。
AI.method: 以InsLoc预训练任务为核心，提出视图增强策略：调整裁剪比例、添加IoU约束、融合显著性先验，并引入减少快捷路径的增强方法（如泊松融合、弹性变形）。
AI.result: 在抽象、天气和上下文领域偏移场景中验证策略有效性，表明组合使用不同视图设计可显著提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计对比视图策略，可有效增强目标检测模型对领域偏移的适应能力，为预训练任务提供可复用的鲁棒性优化方案。

authors_text: Giovanni Betti,Federico Tartarini,Christine Nguyen,Stefano Schiavon
title: CBE Clima Tool: a free and open-source web application for climate analysis tailored to sustainable building design
title_zh: CBE Clima Tool：一款免费开源网络应用程序，用于针对可持续建筑设计量身定制的气候分析
abstract: Buildings that are designed specifically to respond to the local climate can be more comfortable, energy-efficient, and with a lower environmental impact. However, there are many social, cultural, and economic obstacles that might prevent the wide adoption of designing climate-adapted buildings. One of the said obstacles can be removed by enabling practitioners to easily access and analyse local climate data. The CBE Clima Tool (Clima) is a free and open-source web application that offers easy access to publicly available weather files (in EPW format) specifically created for building energy simulation and design. It provides a series of interactive visualization of the variables therein contained and several derived ones. It is aimed at students, educators, and practitioners in the architecture and engineering fields. Since its launch has been consistently recording over 3000 monthly unique users from over 70 countries worldwide, both in professional and educational settings.
summary: Buildings that are designed specifically to respond to the local climate can be more comfortable, energy-efficient, and with a lower environmental impact. However, there are many social, cultural, and economic obstacles that might prevent the wide adoption of designing climate-adapted buildings. One of the said obstacles can be removed by enabling practitioners to easily access and analyse local climate data. The CBE Clima Tool (Clima) is a free and open-source web application that offers easy access to publicly available weather files (in EPW format) specifically created for building energy simulation and design. It provides a series of interactive visualization of the variables therein contained and several derived ones. It is aimed at students, educators, and practitioners in the architecture and engineering fields. Since its launch has been consistently recording over 3000 monthly unique users from over 70 countries worldwide, both in professional and educational settings.
abstract_zh: 专门为适应当地气候而设计的建筑可以更加舒适、节能且对环境的影响较小。然而，许多社会、文化和经济障碍可能会阻碍气候适应建筑设计的广泛采用。上述障碍之一可以通过使从业者能够轻松访问和分析当地气候数据来消除。 CBE Clima Tool (Clima) 是一款免费的开源 Web 应用程序，可轻松访问专为建筑能源模拟和设计而创建的公开天气文件（EPW 格式）。它提供了其中包含的变量和几个派生变量的一系列交互式可视化。它面向建筑和工程领域的学生、教育工作者和从业者。自推出以来，每月持续记录来自全球 70 多个国家/地区的 3000 多名专业和教育环境中的独立用户。

AI.tldr: 开发了一个免费开源的网络工具CBE Clima Tool，用于提供气候数据分析和可视化，支持可持续建筑设计。
AI.motivation: 气候适应性建筑面临社会、文化及经济障碍，其中缺乏便捷的气候数据访问工具是关键问题，需通过易用工具促进可持续设计实践。
AI.method: 构建免费开源的网络应用，整合公开的EPW格式天气数据，提供交互式气候变量可视化及衍生分析功能。
AI.result: 工具上线后每月吸引全球70多个国家超3000名独立用户，在教育和专业领域广泛应用。
AI.conclusion: CBE Clima Tool通过降低气候数据使用门槛，有效推动了建筑行业气候适应性设计的实践与教育普及。

authors_text: Joey Hong,Aviral Kumar,Sergey Levine
title: Confidence-Conditioned Value Functions for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 离线强化学习的置信条件价值函数
comment: published as a paper in ICLR 2023; 16 pages
comments: published as a paper in ICLR 2023; 16 pages
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) promises the ability to learn effective policies solely using existing, static datasets, without any costly online interaction. To do so, offline RL methods must handle distributional shift between the dataset and the learned policy. The most common approach is to learn conservative, or lower-bound, value functions, which underestimate the return of out-of-distribution (OOD) actions. However, such methods exhibit one notable drawback: policies optimized on such value functions can only behave according to a fixed, possibly suboptimal, degree of conservatism. However, this can be alleviated if we instead are able to learn policies for varying degrees of conservatism at training time and devise a method to dynamically choose one of them during evaluation. To do so, in this work, we propose learning value functions that additionally condition on the degree of conservatism, which we dub confidence-conditioned value functions. We derive a new form of a Bellman backup that simultaneously learns Q-values for any degree of confidence with high probability. By conditioning on confidence, our value functions enable adaptive strategies during online evaluation by controlling for confidence level using the history of observations thus far. This approach can be implemented in practice by conditioning the Q-function from existing conservative algorithms on the confidence.We theoretically show that our learned value functions produce conservative estimates of the true value at any desired confidence. Finally, we empirically show that our algorithm outperforms existing conservative offline RL algorithms on multiple discrete control domains.

To do so, offline RL methods must handle distributional shift between the dataset and the learned policy. The most common approach is to learn conservative, or lower-bound, value functions, which underestimate the return of out-of-distribution (OOD) actions. However, such methods exhibit one notable drawback: policies optimized on such value functions can only behave according to a fixed, possibly suboptimal, degree of conservatism. However, this can be alleviated if we instead are able to learn policies for varying degrees of conservatism at training time and devise a method to dynamically choose one of them during evaluation. To do so, in this work, we propose learning value functions that additionally condition on the degree of conservatism, which we dub confidence-conditioned value functions. We derive a new form of a Bellman backup that simultaneously learns Q-values for any degree of confidence with high probability. By conditioning on confidence, our value functions enable adaptive strategies during online evaluation by controlling for confidence level using the history of observations thus far. This approach can be implemented in practice by conditioning the Q-function from existing conservative algorithms on the confidence.We theoretically show that our learned value functions produce conservative estimates of the true value at any desired confidence. Finally, we empirically show that our algorithm outperforms existing conservative offline RL algorithms on multiple discrete control domains.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）有望仅使用现有的静态数据集来学习有效的策略，而无需任何昂贵的在线交互。为此，离线强化学习方法必须处理数据集和学习策略之间的分布变化。最常见的方法是学习保守的或下限的价值函数，它低估了分布外（OOD）行为的回报。然而，此类方法表现出一个显着的缺点：针对此类价值函数优化的策略只能按照固定的、可能次优的保守程度行事。然而，如果我们能够在训练时学习不同程度保守性的策略，并设计一种在评估期间动态选择其中一个策略的方法，那么这种情况就可以得到缓解。为此，在这项工作中，我们提出了额外以保守程度为条件的学习价值函数，我们将其称为置信条件价值函数。我们推导出贝尔曼备份的一种新形式，它可以同时以高概率学习任何置信度的 Q 值。通过以置信度为条件，我们的价值函数通过使用迄今为止的观察历史来控制置信度，从而在在线评估期间启用自适应策略。这种方法可以通过在置信度上调节现有保守算法的 Q 函数来在实践中实现。我们从理论上表明，我们学习的价值函数可以在任何所需的置信度下产生真实值的保守估计。最后，我们凭经验证明，我们的算法在多个离散控制域上优于现有的保守离线强化学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于置信度条件的价值函数方法，用于改进离线强化学习中策略的保守性适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法通过保守价值函数处理分布偏移，但策略的保守程度固定，无法动态调整，导致潜在次优表现。
AI.method: 设计置信度条件价值函数，通过贝尔曼备份同时学习任意置信度下的Q值，并利用观测历史动态调整评估时的保守程度。
AI.result: 在多个离散控制任务中，该算法优于现有保守离线强化学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 置信度条件价值函数通过动态调整保守性，在保证安全性的同时提升了离线强化学习的策略性能。

authors_text: Indranil Sur,Zachary Daniels,Abrar Rahman,Kamil Faber,Gianmarco J. Gallardo,Tyler L. Hayes,Cameron E. Taylor,Mustafa Burak Gurbuz,James Smith,Sahana Joshi,Nathalie Japkowicz,Michael Baron,Zsolt Kira,Christopher Kanan,Roberto Corizzo,Ajay Divakaran,Michael Piacentino,Jesse Hostetler,Aswin Raghavan
title: System Design for an Integrated Lifelong Reinforcement Learning Agent for Real-Time Strategy Games
title_zh: 实时策略游戏集成终身强化学习代理的系统设计
comment: The Second International Conference on AIML Systems, October 12--15, 2022, Bangalore, India
comments: The Second International Conference on AIML Systems, October 12--15, 2022, Bangalore, India
abstract: As Artificial and Robotic Systems are increasingly deployed and relied upon for real-world applications, it is important that they exhibit the ability to continually learn and adapt in dynamically-changing environments, becoming Lifelong Learning Machines. Continual/lifelong learning (LL) involves minimizing catastrophic forgetting of old tasks while maximizing a model's capability to learn new tasks. This paper addresses the challenging lifelong reinforcement learning (L2RL) setting. Pushing the state-of-the-art forward in L2RL and making L2RL useful for practical applications requires more than developing individual L2RL algorithms; it requires making progress at the systems-level, especially research into the non-trivial problem of how to integrate multiple L2RL algorithms into a common framework. In this paper, we introduce the Lifelong Reinforcement Learning Components Framework (L2RLCF), which standardizes L2RL systems and assimilates different continual learning components (each addressing different aspects of the lifelong learning problem) into a unified system. As an instantiation of L2RLCF, we develop a standard API allowing easy integration of novel lifelong learning components. We describe a case study that demonstrates how multiple independently-developed LL components can be integrated into a single realized system. We also introduce an evaluation environment in order to measure the effect of combining various system components. Our evaluation environment employs different LL scenarios (sequences of tasks) consisting of Starcraft-2 minigames and allows for the fair, comprehensive, and quantitative comparison of different combinations of components within a challenging common evaluation environment.

Our evaluation environment employs different LL scenarios (sequences of tasks) consisting of Starcraft-2 minigames and allows for the fair, comprehensive, and quantitative comparison of different combinations of components within a challenging common evaluation environment.
abstract_zh: 随着人工和机器人系统越来越多地被部署和依赖于现实世界的应用，它们表现出在动态变化的环境中不断学习和适应的能力，成为终身学习机器，这一点非常重要。持续/终身学习（LL）涉及最大限度地减少对旧任务的灾难性遗忘，同时最大限度地提高模型学习新任务的能力。本文讨论了具有挑战性的终身强化学习（L2RL）设置。推动 L2RL 最先进的技术发展并使 L2RL 在实际应用中发挥作用需要的不仅仅是开发单独的 L2RL 算法；它需要在系统层面取得进展，特别是研究如何将多种 L2RL 算法集成到一个通用框架中这一重要问题。在本文中，我们介绍了终身强化学习组件框架（L2RLCF），该框架标准化了 L2RL 系统，并将不同的持续学习组件（每个组件解决终身学习问题的不同方面）吸收到一个统一的系统中。作为 L2RLCF 的实例，我们开发了一个标准 API，可以轻松集成新颖的终身学习组件。我们描述了一个案例研究，展示了如何将多个独立开发的 LL 组件集成到单个实现的系统中。我们还引入了一个评估环境，以衡量组合各种系统组件的效果。我们的评估环境采用由 Starcraft-2 小游戏组成的不同 LL 场景（任务序列），并允许在具有挑战性的公共评估环境中对不同组件组合进行公平、全面和定量的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个标准化框架L2RLCF，用于整合多种持续学习组件，以解决实时策略游戏中的终身强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中AI系统需在动态环境中持续学习并避免遗忘旧任务，但现有研究多聚焦单一算法，缺乏系统级整合方案。
AI.method: 设计L2RLCF框架标准化系统架构，开发通用API集成不同持续学习组件，并构建基于StarCraft-2小游戏的评估环境进行量化比较。
AI.result: 验证了多组件集成的有效性，展示了不同组合在任务序列中的适应性表现，为L2RL系统优化提供实验基准。
AI.conclusion: 框架实现了持续学习组件的模块化整合，推动了终身强化学习在复杂动态场景中的实际应用研究。

authors_text: Yiding Jiang,Evan Zheran Liu,Benjamin Eysenbach,Zico Kolter,Chelsea Finn
title: Learning Options via Compression
title_zh: 通过压缩学习选项
abstract: Identifying statistical regularities in solutions to some tasks in multi-task reinforcement learning can accelerate the learning of new tasks. Skill learning offers one way of identifying these regularities by decomposing pre-collected experiences into a sequence of skills. A popular approach to skill learning is maximizing the likelihood of the pre-collected experience with latent variable models, where the latent variables represent the skills. However, there are often many solutions that maximize the likelihood equally well, including degenerate solutions. To address this underspecification, we propose a new objective that combines the maximum likelihood objective with a penalty on the description length of the skills. This penalty incentivizes the skills to maximally extract common structures from the experiences. Empirically, our objective learns skills that solve downstream tasks in fewer samples compared to skills learned from only maximizing likelihood. Further, while most prior works in the offline multi-task setting focus on tasks with low-dimensional observations, our objective can scale to challenging tasks with high-dimensional image observations.
summary: Identifying statistical regularities in solutions to some tasks in multi-task reinforcement learning can accelerate the learning of new tasks. Skill learning offers one way of identifying these regularities by decomposing pre-collected experiences into a sequence of skills. A popular approach to skill learning is maximizing the likelihood of the pre-collected experience with latent variable models, where the latent variables represent the skills. However, there are often many solutions that maximize the likelihood equally well, including degenerate solutions. To address this underspecification, we propose a new objective that combines the maximum likelihood objective with a penalty on the description length of the skills. This penalty incentivizes the skills to maximally extract common structures from the experiences. Empirically, our objective learns skills that solve downstream tasks in fewer samples compared to skills learned from only maximizing likelihood. Further, while most prior works in the offline multi-task setting focus on tasks with low-dimensional observations, our objective can scale to challenging tasks with high-dimensional image observations.
abstract_zh: 识别多任务强化学习中某些任务解决方案的统计规律可以加速新任务的学习。技能学习提供了一种通过将预先收集的经验分解为一系列技能来识别这些规律的方法。技能学习的一种流行方法是利用潜变量模型最大化预先收集的经验的可能性，其中潜变量代表技能。然而，通常有许多解决方案可以同样很好地最大化可能性，包括退化解决方案。为了解决这种不规范的问题，我们提出了一个新的目标，它将最大似然目标与对技能描述长度的惩罚相结合。这种惩罚会激励最大限度地从经验中提取共同结构的技能。根据经验，与仅通过最大化可能性学习的技能相比，我们的目标学习以更少的样本解决下游任务的技能。此外，虽然离线多任务设置中的大多数先前工作都集中于低维观察任务，但我们的目标可以扩展到具有高维图像观察的挑战性任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过压缩方法学习多任务强化学习中的技能，以提取经验中的共同结构，提升新任务的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于最大似然的技能学习方法存在欠规范问题，可能导致退化解，无法有效提取经验中的统计规律。
AI.method: 在最大似然目标中引入技能描述长度惩罚项，通过压缩激励技能提取经验中的共性结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在下游任务样本效率上优于纯最大似然方法，且可扩展至高维图像观测的复杂任务。
AI.conclusion: 结合压缩的技能学习目标能有效解决欠规范问题，在多任务强化学习中实现更高效的任务泛化。

search_text: Learning Options via Compression 通过压缩学习选项 Identifying statistical regularities in solutions to some tasks in multi-task reinforcement learning can accelerate the learning of new tasks. Skill learning offers one way of identifying these regularities by decomposing pre-collected experiences into a sequence of skills. A popular approach to skill learning is maximizing the likelihood of the pre-collected experience with latent variable models, where the latent variables represent the skills. However, there are often many solutions that maximize the likelihood equally well, including degenerate solutions. To address this underspecification, we propose a new objective that combines the maximum likelihood objective with a penalty on the description length of the skills. This penalty incentivizes the skills to maximally extract common structures from the experiences. Empirically, our objective learns skills that solve downstream tasks in fewer samples compared to skills learned from only maximizing likelihood. Further, while most prior works in the offline multi-task setting focus on tasks with low-dimensional observations, our objective can scale to challenging tasks with high-dimensional image observations. 识别多任务强化学习中某些任务解决方案的统计规律可以加速新任务的学习。技能学习提供了一种通过将预先收集的经验分解为一系列技能来识别这些规律的方法。技能学习的一种流行方法是利用潜变量模型最大化预先收集的经验的可能性，其中潜变量代表技能。然而，通常有许多解决方案可以同样很好地最大化可能性，包括退化解决方案。为了解决这种不规范的问题，我们提出了一个新的目标，它将最大似然目标与对技能描述长度的惩罚相结合。这种惩罚会激励最大限度地从经验中提取共同结构的技能。根据经验，与仅通过最大化可能性学习的技能相比，我们的目标学习以更少的样本解决下游任务的技能。此外，虽然离线多任务设置中的大多数先前工作都集中于低维观察任务，但我们的目标可以扩展到具有高维图像观察的挑战性任务。 本文提出通过压缩方法学习多任务强化学习中的技能，以提取经验中的共同结构，提升新任务的学习效率。 Yiding Jiang,Evan Zheran Liu,Benjamin Eysenbach,Zico Kolter,Chelsea Finn cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Eduardo C. Garrido-Merchán,Javier Sánchez-Cañizares
title: Optimizing Integrated Information with a Prior Guided Random Search Algorithm
title_zh: 使用先验引导随机搜索算法优化综合信息
abstract: Integrated information theory (IIT) is a theoretical framework that provides a quantitative measure to estimate when a physical system is conscious, its degree of consciousness, and the complexity of the qualia space that the system is experiencing. Formally, IIT rests on the assumption that if a surrogate physical system can fully embed the phenomenological properties of consciousness, then the system properties must be constrained by the properties of the qualia being experienced. Following this assumption, IIT represents the physical system as a network of interconnected elements that can be thought of as a probabilistic causal graph, $\mathcal{G}$, where each node has an input-output function and all the graph is encoded in a transition probability matrix. Consequently, IIT's quantitative measure of consciousness, $Φ$, is computed with respect to the transition probability matrix and the present state of the graph. In this paper, we provide a random search algorithm that is able to optimize $Φ$ in order to investigate, as the number of nodes increases, the structure of the graphs that have higher $Φ$. We also provide arguments that show the difficulties of applying more complex black-box search algorithms, such as Bayesian optimization or metaheuristics, in this particular problem. Additionally, we suggest specific research lines for these techniques to enhance the search algorithm that guarantees maximal $Φ$.
summary: Integrated information theory (IIT) is a theoretical framework that provides a quantitative measure to estimate when a physical system is conscious, its degree of consciousness, and the complexity of the qualia space that the system is experiencing. Formally, IIT rests on the assumption that if a surrogate physical system can fully embed the phenomenological properties of consciousness, then the system properties must be constrained by the properties of the qualia being experienced. Following this assumption, IIT represents the physical system as a network of interconnected elements that can be thought of as a probabilistic causal graph, $\mathcal{G}$, where each node has an input-output function and all the graph is encoded in a transition probability matrix. Consequently, IIT's quantitative measure of consciousness, $Φ$, is computed with respect to the transition probability matrix and the present state of the graph. In this paper, we provide a random search algorithm that is able to optimize $Φ$ in order to investigate, as the number of nodes increases, the structure of the graphs that have higher $Φ$. We also provide arguments that show the difficulties of applying more complex black-box search algorithms, such as Bayesian optimization or metaheuristics, in this particular problem. Additionally, we suggest specific research lines for these techniques to enhance the search algorithm that guarantees maximal $Φ$.
abstract_zh: 综合信息论（IIT）是一个理论框架，它提供了一种定量测量来估计物理系统何时有意识、其意识程度以及系统正在经历的感受性空间的复杂性。形式上，IIT 基于这样的假设：如果替代物理系统能够完全嵌入意识的现象学属性，那么该系统属性必须受到所体验的感受性属性的约束。遵循这一假设，IIT 将物理系统表示为互连元素的网络，可以将其视为概率因果图 $\mathcal{G}$，其中每个节点都有一个输入输出函数，并且所有图都编码在一个转移概率矩阵中。因此，IIT 的意识定量度量 $Φ$ 是根据转移概率矩阵和图的当前状态计算的。在本文中，我们提供了一种能够优化 $Φ$ 的随机搜索算法，以便随着节点数量的增加，研究具有较高 $Φ$ 的图的结构。我们还提供了论据，表明在这个特定问题中应用更复杂的黑盒搜索算法（例如贝叶斯优化或元启发式算法）的困难。此外，我们还建议针对这些技术的具体研究方向，以增强保证最大$Φ$ 的搜索算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于先验引导的随机搜索算法，用于优化整合信息理论（IIT）中的Φ值，研究节点数量增加时最大化Φ的图结构。
AI.motivation: 整合信息理论（IIT）通过Φ值量化意识水平，但现有方法难以高效搜索复杂系统中最大化Φ的图结构，需开发适配算法以探索意识复杂性。
AI.method: 设计先验引导的随机搜索算法，避免使用贝叶斯优化等复杂黑箱方法，并论证其在该问题中的适用性及改进方向。
AI.result: 算法能有效优化Φ值，揭示节点数增加时高Φ图结构的特征，同时指出复杂优化方法在此问题中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 随机搜索算法适用于Φ优化问题，未来需结合其他技术进一步提升搜索效率与精度。

authors_text: Grant Davidson,Mark Vinton,Per Ekstrand,Cong Zhou,Lars Villemoes,Lie Lu
title: High Quality Audio Coding with MDCTNet
title_zh: 使用 MDCTNet 进行高质量音频编码
abstract: We propose a neural audio generative model, MDCTNet, operating in the perceptually weighted domain of an adaptive modified discrete cosine transform (MDCT). The architecture of the model captures correlations in both time and frequency directions with recurrent layers (RNNs). An audio coding system is obtained by training MDCTNet on a diverse set of fullband monophonic audio signals at 48 kHz sampling, conditioned by a perceptual audio encoder. In a subjective listening test with ten excerpts chosen to be balanced across content types, yet stressful for both codecs, the mean performance of the proposed system for 24 kb/s variable bitrate (VBR) is similar to that of Opus at twice the bitrate.
summary: We propose a neural audio generative model, MDCTNet, operating in the perceptually weighted domain of an adaptive modified discrete cosine transform (MDCT). The architecture of the model captures correlations in both time and frequency directions with recurrent layers (RNNs). An audio coding system is obtained by training MDCTNet on a diverse set of fullband monophonic audio signals at 48 kHz sampling, conditioned by a perceptual audio encoder. In a subjective listening test with ten excerpts chosen to be balanced across content types, yet stressful for both codecs, the mean performance of the proposed system for 24 kb/s variable bitrate (VBR) is similar to that of Opus at twice the bitrate.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种神经音频生成模型 MDCTNet，在自适应改进离散余弦变换 (MDCT) 的感知加权域中运行。该模型的架构利用循环层 (RNN) 捕获时间和频率方向上的相关性。音频编码系统是通过在 48 kHz 采样的不同全带单声道音频信号上训练 MDCTNet 来获得的，并由感知音频编码器调节。在主观听力测试中，选择了 10 个摘录来平衡内容类型，但对两种编解码器都有压力，所提出的系统在 24 kb/s 可变比特率 (VBR) 下的平均性能与 Opus 在两倍比特率下的平均性能相似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应改进离散余弦变换（MDCT）的神经音频生成模型MDCTNet，用于实现高质量音频编码。
AI.motivation: 传统音频编码在高压缩率下难以兼顾音质与效率，需探索更高效的神经网络模型以提升编码性能。
AI.method: 设计MDCTNet模型，在感知加权的MDCT域中使用循环层（RNNs）捕捉时频相关性，并通过感知音频编码器条件训练，实现24kb/s可变比特率编码。
AI.result: 主观测试显示，MDCTNet在24kb/s VBR下的平均性能与Opus在48kb/s下的表现相当，验证了其高效性。
AI.conclusion: MDCTNet在高压缩率下实现了接近传统编码器的音质，为高质量音频编码提供了新的神经网络解决方案。

motivation: 传统音频编码在高压缩率下难以兼顾音质与效率，需探索更高效的神经网络模型以提升编码性能。
method: 设计MDCTNet模型，在感知加权的MDCT域中使用循环层（RNNs）捕捉时频相关性，并通过感知音频编码器条件训练，实现24kb/s可变比特率编码。
result: 主观测试显示，MDCTNet在24kb/s VBR下的平均性能与Opus在48kb/s下的表现相当，验证了其高效性。
conclusion: MDCTNet在高压缩率下实现了接近传统编码器的音质，为高质量音频编码提供了新的神经网络解决方案。
search_text: High Quality Audio Coding with MDCTNet 使用 MDCTNet 进行高质量音频编码 We propose a neural audio generative model, MDCTNet, operating in the perceptually weighted domain of an adaptive modified discrete cosine transform (MDCT). The architecture of the model captures correlations in both time and frequency directions with recurrent layers (RNNs). An audio coding system is obtained by training MDCTNet on a diverse set of fullband monophonic audio signals at 48 kHz sampling, conditioned by a perceptual audio encoder. In a subjective listening test with ten excerpts chosen to be balanced across content types, yet stressful for both codecs, the mean performance of the proposed system for 24 kb/s variable bitrate (VBR) is similar to that of Opus at twice the bitrate. 我们提出了一种神经音频生成模型 MDCTNet，在自适应改进离散余弦变换 (MDCT) 的感知加权域中运行。该模型的架构利用循环层 (RNN) 捕获时间和频率方向上的相关性。音频编码系统是通过在 48 kHz 采样的不同全带单声道音频信号上训练 MDCTNet 来获得的，并由感知音频编码器调节。在主观听力测试中，选择了 10 个摘录来平衡内容类型，但对两种编解码器都有压力，所提出的系统在 24 kb/s 可变比特率 (VBR) 下的平均性能与 Opus 在两倍比特率下的平均性能相似。 本文提出了一种基于自适应改进离散余弦变换（MDCT）的神经音频生成模型MDCTNet，用于实现高质量音频编码。 Grant Davidson,Mark Vinton,Per Ekstrand,Cong Zhou,Lars Villemoes,Lie Lu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Natalia Valderrama,Paola Ruiz Puentes,Isabela Hernández,Nicolás Ayobi,Mathilde Verlyk,Jessica Santander,Juan Caicedo,Nicolás Fernández,Pablo Arbeláez
title: Towards Holistic Surgical Scene Understanding
title_zh: 实现整体手术场景理解
comment: MICCAI 2022 Oral. Official extension published at arXiv:2401.11174 . Data and codes available at https://github.com/BCV-Uniandes/TAPIR
comments: MICCAI 2022 Oral. Official extension published at arXiv:2401.11174 . Data and codes available at https://github.com/BCV-Uniandes/TAPIR
abstract: Most benchmarks for studying surgical interventions focus on a specific challenge instead of leveraging the intrinsic complementarity among different tasks. In this work, we present a new experimental framework towards holistic surgical scene understanding. First, we introduce the Phase, Step, Instrument, and Atomic Visual Action recognition (PSI-AVA) Dataset. PSI-AVA includes annotations for both long-term (Phase and Step recognition) and short-term reasoning (Instrument detection and novel Atomic Action recognition) in robot-assisted radical prostatectomy videos. Second, we present Transformers for Action, Phase, Instrument, and steps Recognition (TAPIR) as a strong baseline for surgical scene understanding. TAPIR leverages our dataset's multi-level annotations as it benefits from the learned representation on the instrument detection task to improve its classification capacity. Our experimental results in both PSI-AVA and other publicly available databases demonstrate the adequacy of our framework to spur future research on holistic surgical scene understanding.
summary: Most benchmarks for studying surgical interventions focus on a specific challenge instead of leveraging the intrinsic complementarity among different tasks. In this work, we present a new experimental framework towards holistic surgical scene understanding. First, we introduce the Phase, Step, Instrument, and Atomic Visual Action recognition (PSI-AVA) Dataset. PSI-AVA includes annotations for both long-term (Phase and Step recognition) and short-term reasoning (Instrument detection and novel Atomic Action recognition) in robot-assisted radical prostatectomy videos. Second, we present Transformers for Action, Phase, Instrument, and steps Recognition (TAPIR) as a strong baseline for surgical scene understanding. TAPIR leverages our dataset's multi-level annotations as it benefits from the learned representation on the instrument detection task to improve its classification capacity. Our experimental results in both PSI-AVA and other publicly available databases demonstrate the adequacy of our framework to spur future research on holistic surgical scene understanding.
abstract_zh: 研究外科手术的大多数基准都侧重于特定的挑战，而不是利用不同任务之间的内在互补性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新的实验框架来理解整体手术场景。首先，我们介绍阶段、步骤、仪器和原子视觉动作识别（PSI-AVA）数据集。 PSI-AVA 包括机器人辅助根治性前列腺切除术视频中长期（阶段和步骤识别）和短期推理（仪器检测和新型原子动作识别）的注释。其次，我们提出用于动作、阶段、仪器和步骤识别的变压器 (TAPIR) 作为手术场景理解的强大基线。 TAPIR 利用我们数据集的多级注释，因为它受益于仪器检测任务的学习表示，以提高其分类能力。我们在 PSI-AVA 和其他公开数据库中的实验结果证明了我们的框架足以促进未来对整体手术场景理解的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向全息手术场景理解的实验框架，通过多任务联合学习提升手术场景的解析能力。
AI.motivation: 现有手术场景研究 benchmarks 通常仅针对单一任务，未能利用不同任务间的内在互补性，限制了整体理解能力的提升。
AI.method: 构建包含长时序（阶段/步骤识别）与短时序（器械检测/原子动作识别）标注的 PSI-AVA 数据集，并设计多任务 Transformer 模型 TAPIR，通过器械检测任务的表征学习增强分类性能。
AI.result: 在 PSI-AVA 及其他公开数据集上的实验验证了框架有效性，证明多任务联合学习能显著提升手术场景理解的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为手术场景的全息理解提供了新范式，可推动多模态、多粒度手术分析技术的发展。

TAPIR leverages our dataset's multi-level annotations as it benefits from the learned representation on the instrument detection task to improve its classification capacity. Our experimental results in both PSI-AVA and other publicly available databases demonstrate the adequacy of our framework to spur future research on holistic surgical scene understanding. 研究外科手术的大多数基准都侧重于特定的挑战，而不是利用不同任务之间的内在互补性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新的实验框架来理解整体手术场景。首先，我们介绍阶段、步骤、仪器和原子视觉动作识别（PSI-AVA）数据集。 PSI-AVA 包括机器人辅助根治性前列腺切除术视频中长期（阶段和步骤识别）和短期推理（仪器检测和新型原子动作识别）的注释。其次，我们提出用于动作、阶段、仪器和步骤识别的变压器 (TAPIR) 作为手术场景理解的强大基线。 TAPIR 利用我们数据集的多级注释，因为它受益于仪器检测任务的学习表示，以提高其分类能力。我们在 PSI-AVA 和其他公开数据库中的实验结果证明了我们的框架足以促进未来对整体手术场景理解的研究。 本文提出一个面向全息手术场景理解的实验框架，通过多任务联合学习提升手术场景的解析能力。 Natalia Valderrama,Paola Ruiz Puentes,Isabela Hernández,Nicolás Ayobi,Mathilde Verlyk,Jessica Santander,Juan Caicedo,Nicolás Fernández,Pablo Arbeláez cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Onur Beker,Mohammad Mohammadi,Amir Zamir
title: PALMER: Perception-Action Loop with Memory for Long-Horizon Planning
title_zh: PALMER：带有记忆的感知-行动循环，用于长期规划
abstract: To achieve autonomy in a priori unknown real-world scenarios, agents should be able to: i) act from high-dimensional sensory observations (e.g., images), ii) learn from past experience to adapt and improve, and iii) be capable of long horizon planning. Classical planning algorithms (e.g. PRM, RRT) are proficient at handling long-horizon planning. Deep learning based methods in turn can provide the necessary representations to address the others, by modeling statistical contingencies between observations. In this direction, we introduce a general-purpose planning algorithm called PALMER that combines classical sampling-based planning algorithms with learning-based perceptual representations. For training these perceptual representations, we combine Q-learning with contrastive representation learning to create a latent space where the distance between the embeddings of two states captures how easily an optimal policy can traverse between them. For planning with these perceptual representations, we re-purpose classical sampling-based planning algorithms to retrieve previously observed trajectory segments from a replay buffer and restitch them into approximately optimal paths that connect any given pair of start and goal states. This creates a tight feedback loop between representation learning, memory, reinforcement learning, and sampling-based planning. The end result is an experiential framework for long-horizon planning that is significantly more robust and sample efficient compared to existing methods.
summary: To achieve autonomy in a priori unknown real-world scenarios, agents should be able to: i) act from high-dimensional sensory observations (e.g., images), ii) learn from past experience to adapt and improve, and iii) be capable of long horizon planning. Classical planning algorithms (e.g. PRM, RRT) are proficient at handling long-horizon planning. Deep learning based methods in turn can provide the necessary representations to address the others, by modeling statistical contingencies between observations. In this direction, we introduce a general-purpose planning algorithm called PALMER that combines classical sampling-based planning algorithms with learning-based perceptual representations. For training these perceptual representations, we combine Q-learning with contrastive representation learning to create a latent space where the distance between the embeddings of two states captures how easily an optimal policy can traverse between them. For planning with these perceptual representations, we re-purpose classical sampling-based planning algorithms to retrieve previously observed trajectory segments from a replay buffer and restitch them into approximately optimal paths that connect any given pair of start and goal states. This creates a tight feedback loop between representation learning, memory, reinforcement learning, and sampling-based planning. The end result is an experiential framework for long-horizon planning that is significantly more robust and sample efficient compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 为了在先验未知的现实世界场景中实现自主，智能体应该能够：i）根据高维感官观察（例如图像）采取行动，ii）从过去的经验中学习以适应和改进，以及iii）能够进行长期规划。经典规划算法（例如 PRM、RRT）擅长处理长期规划。基于深度学习的方法反过来可以通过对观察之间的统计偶然性进行建模来提供必要的表示来解决其他问题。在这个方向上，我们引入了一种称为 PALMER 的通用规划算法，它将经典的基于采样的规划算法与基于学习的感知表示相结合。为了训练这些感知表示，我们将 Q 学习与对比表示学习相结合，创建一个潜在空间，其中两个状态的嵌入之间的距离捕获了最优策略在它们之间遍历的容易程度。为了使用这些感知表示进行规划，我们重新利用经典的基于采样的规划算法，从重放缓冲区中检索以前观察到的轨迹段，并将它们重新拼接成连接任何给定的起始状态和目标状态对的近似最佳路径。这在表示学习、记忆、强化学习和基于采样的规划之间创建了一个紧密的反馈循环。最终结果是一个用于长期规划的经验框架，与现有方法相比，该框架更加稳健且样本效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PALMER算法，结合经典采样规划与学习感知表示，解决未知环境下的长时程规划问题。
AI.motivation: 经典规划算法擅长长时程规划但无法处理高维感知数据，深度学习方法虽能建模感知但缺乏长期规划能力，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 通过Q-learning与对比学习构建状态嵌入空间，利用经典规划算法从回放缓冲区检索轨迹片段并拼接为近似最优路径，形成感知-动作-记忆反馈闭环。
AI.result: 实验表明PALMER在复杂场景中比现有方法更鲁棒且样本效率更高，能有效处理高维感知与长时程规划的联合挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合经典规划与深度学习，为未知环境下的长时程自主决策提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Javid Abderezaei,Aymeric Pionteck,Agamdeep Chopra,Mehmet Kurt
title: 3D Inception-Based TransMorph: Pre- and Post-operative Multi-contrast MRI Registration in Brain Tumors
title_zh: 基于 3D Inception 的 TransMorph：脑肿瘤术前和术后多重对比 MRI 配准
comment: Contribution to the BraTS-Reg Challenge at MICCAI conference
comments: Contribution to the BraTS-Reg Challenge at MICCAI conference
abstract: Deformable image registration is a key task in medical image analysis. The Brain Tumor Sequence Registration challenge (BraTS-Reg) aims at establishing correspondences between pre-operative and follow-up scans of the same patient diagnosed with an adult brain diffuse high-grade glioma and intends to address the challenging task of registering longitudinal data with major tissue appearance changes. In this work, we proposed a two-stage cascaded network based on the Inception and TransMorph models. The dataset for each patient was comprised of a native pre-contrast (T1), a contrast-enhanced T1-weighted (T1-CE), a T2-weighted (T2), and a Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR). The Inception model was used to fuse the 4 image modalities together and extract the most relevant information. Then, a variant of the TransMorph architecture was adapted to generate the displacement fields. The Loss function was composed of a standard image similarity measure, a diffusion regularizer, and an edge-map similarity measure added to overcome intensity dependence and reinforce correct boundary deformation. We observed that the addition of the Inception module substantially increased the performance of the network. Additionally, performing an initial affine registration before training the model showed improved accuracy in the landmark error measurements between pre and post-operative MRIs. We observed that our best model composed of the Inception and TransMorph architectures while using an initially affine registered dataset had the best performance with a median absolute error of 2.91 (initial error = 7.8). We achieved 6th place at the time of model submission in the final testing phase of the BraTS-Reg challenge.

The dataset for each patient was comprised of a native pre-contrast (T1), a contrast-enhanced T1-weighted (T1-CE), a T2-weighted (T2), and a Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR). The Inception model was used to fuse the 4 image modalities together and extract the most relevant information. Then, a variant of the TransMorph architecture was adapted to generate the displacement fields. abstract_zh: 变形图像配准是医学图像分析中的关键任务。脑肿瘤序列配准挑战（BraTS-Reg）旨在建立诊断为成人脑弥漫性高级神经胶质瘤的同一患者的术前和随访扫描之间的对应关系，并旨在解决将纵向数据与主要组织外观变化配准的挑战性任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 Inception 和 TransMorph 模型的两级级联网络。每个患者的数据集由自然预对比 (T1)、对比增强 T1 加权 (T1-CE)、T2 加权 (T2) 和液体衰减反转恢复 (FLAIR) 组成。 Inception 模型用于将 4 种图像模态融合在一起并提取最相关的信息。然后，采用 TransMorph 架构的变体来生成位移场。损失函数由标准图像相似性度量、扩散正则化器和边缘图相似性度量组成，添加边缘图相似性度量是为了克服强度依赖性并加强正确的边界变形。我们观察到，Inception 模块的添加大大提高了网络的性能。此外，在训练模型之前执行初始仿射配准表明术前和术后 MRI 之间的标志性误差测量的准确性有所提高。我们观察到，由 Inception 和 TransMorph 架构组成的最佳模型在使用初始仿射注册数据集时具有最佳性能，中值绝对误差为 2.91（初始误差 = 7.8）。在 BraTS-Reg 挑战的最终测试阶段提交模型时，我们获得了第六名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Inception和TransMorph模型的两阶段级联网络，用于脑肿瘤患者术前和术后多模态MRI图像配准。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤患者术前与术后MRI图像存在显著组织外观变化，传统配准方法难以准确对齐，需解决纵向数据配准挑战。
AI.method: 融合Inception模块提取多模态图像特征，结合改进的TransMorph模型生成位移场，并采用包含图像相似度、扩散正则化和边缘图相似度的损失函数。
AI.result: 最佳模型在初始仿射配准后达到中位绝对误差2.91mm（初始误差7.8mm），在BraTS-Reg挑战赛中取得第6名。
AI.conclusion: Inception模块与TransMorph结合显著提升配准精度，初始仿射配准可增强边界变形准确性，为脑肿瘤MRI分析提供有效工具。

authors_text: Duo Xu,Faramarz Fekri
title: Generalizing LTL Instructions via Future Dependent Options
title_zh: 通过未来相关选项推广 LTL 指令
abstract: In many real-world applications of control system and robotics, linear temporal logic (LTL) is a widely-used task specification language which has a compositional grammar that naturally induces temporally extended behaviours across tasks, including conditionals and alternative realizations. An important problem in RL with LTL tasks is to learn task-conditioned policies which can zero-shot generalize to new LTL instructions not observed in the training. However, because symbolic observation is often lossy and LTL tasks can have long time horizon, previous works can suffer from issues such as training sampling inefficiency and infeasibility or sub-optimality of the found solutions. In order to tackle these issues, this paper proposes a novel multi-task RL algorithm with improved learning efficiency and optimality. To achieve the global optimality of task completion, we propose to learn options dependent on the future subgoals via a novel off-policy approach. In order to propagate the rewards of satisfying future subgoals back more efficiently, we propose to train a multi-step value function conditioned on the subgoal sequence which is updated with Monte Carlo estimates of multi-step discounted returns. In experiments on three different domains, we evaluate the LTL generalization capability of the agent trained by the proposed method, showing its advantage over previous representative methods.
summary: In many real-world applications of control system and robotics, linear temporal logic (LTL) is a widely-used task specification language which has a compositional grammar that naturally induces temporally extended behaviours across tasks, including conditionals and alternative realizations. An important problem in RL with LTL tasks is to learn task-conditioned policies which can zero-shot generalize to new LTL instructions not observed in the training. However, because symbolic observation is often lossy and LTL tasks can have long time horizon, previous works can suffer from issues such as training sampling inefficiency and infeasibility or sub-optimality of the found solutions. In order to tackle these issues, this paper proposes a novel multi-task RL algorithm with improved learning efficiency and optimality. To achieve the global optimality of task completion, we propose to learn options dependent on the future subgoals via a novel off-policy approach. In order to propagate the rewards of satisfying future subgoals back more efficiently, we propose to train a multi-step value function conditioned on the subgoal sequence which is updated with Monte Carlo estimates of multi-step discounted returns. In experiments on three different domains, we evaluate the LTL generalization capability of the agent trained by the proposed method, showing its advantage over previous representative methods.
abstract_zh: 在控制系统和机器人技术的许多实际应用中，线性时序逻辑（LTL）是一种广泛使用的任务规范语言，其组合语法可以自然地诱导跨任务的时间扩展行为，包括条件和替代实现。 LTL 任务的 RL 中的一个重要问题是学习任务条件策略，这些策略可以零样本泛化到训练中未观察到的新 LTL 指令。然而，由于符号观察通常是有损的，并且 LTL 任务可能有很长的时间范围，因此以前的工作可能会遇到训练采样效率低下以及找到的解决方案不可行或次优等问题。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新颖的多任务强化学习算法，提高了学习效率和最优性。为了实现任务完成的全局最优性，我们建议通过一种新颖的离策略方法来学习依赖于未来子目标的选项。为了更有效地传播满足未来子目标的奖励，我们建议训练一个以子目标序列为条件的多步价值函数，该函数用多步贴现收益的蒙特卡洛估计进行更新。在三个不同领域的实验中，我们评估了所提出的方法训练的代理的 LTL 泛化能力，显示了其相对于先前代表性方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务强化学习算法，通过未来依赖选项和多步价值函数提升LTL任务的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未见过的LTL指令时存在训练效率低、解的次优性等问题，需改进学习效率与最优性。
AI.method: 设计依赖未来子目标的选项，结合多步价值函数与蒙特卡洛估计更新子目标序列，采用离线策略优化。
AI.result: 在三个不同领域实验验证，证明该方法在LTL任务泛化能力上优于现有代表方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过未来子目标与多步价值函数的结合，有效提升复杂任务下的学习效率与全局最优性。

authors_text: Xiangyu Xu,Li Guan,Enrique Dunn,Haoxiang Li,Gang Hua
title: DDM-NET: End-to-end learning of keypoint feature Detection, Description and Matching for 3D localization
title_zh: DDM-NET：3D 定位关键点特征检测、描述和匹配的端到端学习
abstract: In this paper, we propose an end-to-end framework that jointly learns keypoint detection, descriptor representation and cross-frame matching for the task of image-based 3D localization. Prior art has tackled each of these components individually, purportedly aiming to alleviate difficulties in effectively train a holistic network. We design a self-supervised image warping correspondence loss for both feature detection and matching, a weakly-supervised epipolar constraints loss on relative camera pose learning, and a directional matching scheme that detects key-point features in a source image and performs coarse-to-fine correspondence search on the target image. We leverage this framework to enforce cycle consistency in our matching module. In addition, we propose a new loss to robustly handle both definite inlier/outlier matches and less-certain matches. The integration of these learning mechanisms enables end-to-end training of a single network performing all three localization components. Bench-marking our approach on public data-sets, exemplifies how such an end-to-end framework is able to yield more accurate localization that out-performs both traditional methods as well as state-of-the-art weakly supervised methods.
summary: In this paper, we propose an end-to-end framework that jointly learns keypoint detection, descriptor representation and cross-frame matching for the task of image-based 3D localization. Prior art has tackled each of these components individually, purportedly aiming to alleviate difficulties in effectively train a holistic network. We design a self-supervised image warping correspondence loss for both feature detection and matching, a weakly-supervised epipolar constraints loss on relative camera pose learning, and a directional matching scheme that detects key-point features in a source image and performs coarse-to-fine correspondence search on the target image. We leverage this framework to enforce cycle consistency in our matching module. In addition, we propose a new loss to robustly handle both definite inlier/outlier matches and less-certain matches. The integration of these learning mechanisms enables end-to-end training of a single network performing all three localization components. Bench-marking our approach on public data-sets, exemplifies how such an end-to-end framework is able to yield more accurate localization that out-performs both traditional methods as well as state-of-the-art weakly supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个端到端框架，该框架联合学习关键点检测、描述符表示和跨帧匹配，以完成基于图像的 3D 定位任务。现有技术已经单独解决了这些组件中的每一个，据称旨在减轻有效训练整体网络的困难。我们设计了用于特征检测和匹配的自监督图像扭曲对应损失、相对相机姿态学习的弱监督对极约束损失，以及检测源图像中的关键点特征并对目标图像执行从粗到细的对应搜索的方向匹配方案。我们利用这个框架来强制匹配模块中的循环一致性。此外，我们提出了一种新的损失来稳健地处理确定的内点/异常值匹配和不太确定的匹配。这些学习机制的集成使得能够对执行所有三个本地化组件的单个网络进行端到端训练。在公共数据集上对我们的方法进行基准测试，举例说明了这种端到端框架如何能够产生更准确的本地化，其性能优于传统方法以及最先进的弱监督方法。

AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理关键点检测、描述和匹配，难以有效训练整体网络，导致3D定位性能受限。
AI.method: 设计自监督图像变形对应损失、弱监督极线约束损失及方向匹配方案，并引入新损失函数处理内外点和不确定匹配，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证，该框架的定位精度优于传统方法和最新弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 端到端整合关键点检测、描述和匹配能有效提升3D定位性能，证明统一学习框架的优势。
