authors_text: Yijun Wang,Rui Lang,Rui Li,Junsong Zhang
title: NRTR: Neuron Reconstruction with Transformer from 3D Optical Microscopy Images
title_zh: NRTR：使用 Transformer 从 3D 光学显微镜图像重建神经元
abstract: The neuron reconstruction from raw Optical Microscopy (OM) image stacks is the basis of neuroscience. Manual annotation and semi-automatic neuron tracing algorithms are time-consuming and inefficient. Existing deep learning neuron reconstruction methods, although demonstrating exemplary performance, greatly demand complex rule-based components. Therefore, a crucial challenge is designing an end-to-end neuron reconstruction method that makes the overall framework simpler and model training easier. We propose a Neuron Reconstruction Transformer (NRTR) that, discarding the complex rule-based components, views neuron reconstruction as a direct set-prediction problem. To the best of our knowledge, NRTR is the first image-to-set deep learning model for end-to-end neuron reconstruction. In experiments using the BigNeuron and VISoR-40 datasets, NRTR achieves excellent neuron reconstruction results for comprehensive benchmarks and outperforms competitive baselines. Results of extensive experiments indicate that NRTR is effective at showing that neuron reconstruction is viewed as a set-prediction problem, which makes end-to-end model training available.
summary: The neuron reconstruction from raw Optical Microscopy (OM) image stacks is the basis of neuroscience. Manual annotation and semi-automatic neuron tracing algorithms are time-consuming and inefficient. Existing deep learning neuron reconstruction methods, although demonstrating exemplary performance, greatly demand complex rule-based components. Therefore, a crucial challenge is designing an end-to-end neuron reconstruction method that makes the overall framework simpler and model training easier. We propose a Neuron Reconstruction Transformer (NRTR) that, discarding the complex rule-based components, views neuron reconstruction as a direct set-prediction problem. To the best of our knowledge, NRTR is the first image-to-set deep learning model for end-to-end neuron reconstruction. In experiments using the BigNeuron and VISoR-40 datasets, NRTR achieves excellent neuron reconstruction results for comprehensive benchmarks and outperforms competitive baselines. Results of extensive experiments indicate that NRTR is effective at showing that neuron reconstruction is viewed as a set-prediction problem, which makes end-to-end model training available.
abstract_zh: 从原始光学显微镜 (OM) 图像堆栈重建神经元是神经科学的基础。手动注释和半自动神经元追踪算法耗时且低效。现有的深度学习神经元重建方法虽然表现出示范性的性能，但极大地需要复杂的基于规则的组件。因此，一个关键的挑战是设计一种端到端的神经元重建方法，使整体框架更简单，模型训练更容易。我们提出了一种神经元重建变压器（NRTR），它抛弃了复杂的基于规则的组件，将神经元重建视为直接的集合预测问题。据我们所知，NRTR 是第一个用于端到端神经元重建的图像到设置深度学习模型。在使用 BigNeuron 和 VISoR-40 数据集的实验中，NRTR 在综合基准方面取得了出色的神经元重建结果，并且优于竞争基准。大量实验的结果表明，NRTR 有效地表明神经元重建被视为集合预测问题，这使得端到端模型训练成为可能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端神经元重建方法NRTR，用于从3D光学显微镜图像中直接预测神经元结构。
AI.motivation: 传统神经元重建方法依赖耗时的人工标注或半自动算法，现有深度学习方法仍需复杂规则组件，亟需简化框架并提升训练效率。
AI.method: 设计NRTR模型，摒弃规则组件，将神经元重建建模为直接的集合预测问题，利用Transformer处理3D图像并输出神经元结构集合。
AI.result: 在BigNeuron和VISoR-40数据集上，NRTR在多项基准测试中优于现有方法，验证了集合预测范式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NRTR通过集合预测视角实现了端到端神经元重建，简化了模型训练流程并提升了重建效果。

authors_text: Mohammad Zunaed,Shaikh Anowarul Fattah
title: A Novel Hierarchical-Classification-Block Based Convolutional Neural Network for Source Camera Model Identification
title_zh: 一种用于源相机模型识别的新型基于分层分类块的卷积神经网络
abstract: Digital security has been an active area of research interest due to the rapid adaptation of internet infrastructure, the increasing popularity of social media, and digital cameras. Due to inherent differences in working principles to generate an image, different camera brands left behind different intrinsic processing noises which can be used to identify the camera brand. In the last decade, many signal processing and deep learning-based methods have been proposed to identify and isolate this noise from the scene details in an image to detect the source camera brand. One prominent solution is to utilize a hierarchical classification system rather than the traditional single-classifier approach. Different individual networks are used for brand-level and model-level source camera identification. This approach allows for better scaling and requires minimal modifications for adding a new camera brand/model to the solution. However, using different full-fledged networks for both brand and model-level classification substantially increases memory consumption and training complexity. Moreover, extracted low-level features from the different network's initial layers often coincide, resulting in redundant weights. To mitigate the training and memory complexity, we propose a classifier-block-level hierarchical system instead of a network-level one for source camera model classification. Our proposed approach not only results in significantly fewer parameters but also retains the capability to add a new camera model with minimal modification. Thorough experimentation on the publicly available Dresden dataset shows that our proposed approach can achieve the same level of state-of-the-art performance but requires fewer parameters compared to a state-of-the-art network-level hierarchical-based system.
summary: Digital security has been an active area of research interest due to the rapid adaptation of internet infrastructure, the increasing popularity of social media, and digital cameras. Due to inherent differences in working principles to generate an image, different camera brands left behind different intrinsic processing noises which can be used to identify the camera brand. In the last decade, many signal processing and deep learning-based methods have been proposed to identify and isolate this noise from the scene details in an image to detect the source camera brand. One prominent solution is to utilize a hierarchical classification system rather than the traditional single-classifier approach. Different individual networks are used for brand-level and model-level source camera identification. This approach allows for better scaling and requires minimal modifications for adding a new camera brand/model to the solution. However, using different full-fledged networks for both brand and model-level classification substantially increases memory consumption and training complexity. Moreover, extracted low-level features from the different network's initial layers often coincide, resulting in redundant weights. To mitigate the training and memory complexity, we propose a classifier-block-level hierarchical system instead of a network-level one for source camera model classification. Our proposed approach not only results in significantly fewer parameters but also retains the capability to add a new camera model with minimal modification. Thorough experimentation on the publicly available Dresden dataset shows that our proposed approach can achieve the same level of state-of-the-art performance but requires fewer parameters compared to a state-of-the-art network-level hierarchical-based system.
abstract_zh: 由于互联网基础设施的快速适应、社交媒体和数码相机的日益普及，数字安全已成为一个活跃的研究领域。由于生成图像的工作原理存在固有差异，不同的相机品牌会留下不同的固有处理噪声，这些噪声可用于识别相机品牌。在过去的十年中，人们提出了许多基于信号处理和深度学习的方法来识别这种噪声并将其与图像中的场景细节隔离，以检测源相机品牌。一个突出的解决方案是利用分层分类系统而不是传统的单分类器方法。不同的单独网络用于品牌级和型号级源相机识别。这种方法可以实现更好的扩展，并且只需最少的修改即可向解决方案添加新的相机品牌/型号。然而，使用不同的成熟网络进行品牌和模型级分类会大大增加内存消耗和训练复杂性。此外，从不同网络的初始层提取的低级特征通常是重合的，导致冗余权重。为了减轻训练和内存复杂性，我们提出了一种分类器块级分层系统，而不是用于源相机模型分类的网络级系统。我们提出的方法不仅可以显着减少参数，而且还保留了以最小的修改添加新相机模型的能力。对公开的德累斯顿数据集进行的彻底实验表明，与最先进的网络级分层系统相比，我们提出的方法可以实现相同水平的最先进性能，但需要更少的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层分类块的卷积神经网络，用于源相机模型识别，解决现有方法参数冗余和复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分层分类系统使用独立网络进行品牌和型号分类，导致内存消耗大、训练复杂且特征冗余，需更高效结构。
AI.method: 设计分类块级别分层系统，共享部分网络层以减少参数，仅在必要时扩展新分类块，降低冗余权重。
AI.result: 在Dresden数据集实验中，参数量较现有网络级分层系统减少，同时保持相同先进性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 分类块级分层结构有效降低模型复杂度，兼顾性能与扩展性，适用于源相机模型识别任务。

search_text: A Novel Hierarchical-Classification-Block Based Convolutional Neural Network for Source Camera Model Identification 一种用于源相机模型识别的新型基于分层分类块的卷积神经网络 Digital security has been an active area of research interest due to the rapid adaptation of internet infrastructure, the increasing popularity of social media, and digital cameras. Due to inherent differences in working principles to generate an image, different camera brands left behind different intrinsic processing noises which can be used to identify the camera brand. In the last decade, many signal processing and deep learning-based methods have been proposed to identify and isolate this noise from the scene details in an image to detect the source camera brand. One prominent solution is to utilize a hierarchical classification system rather than the traditional single-classifier approach. Different individual networks are used for brand-level and model-level source camera identification. This approach allows for better scaling and requires minimal modifications for adding a new camera brand/model to the solution. However, using different full-fledged networks for both brand and model-level classification substantially increases memory consumption and training complexity. Moreover, extracted low-level features from the different network's initial layers often coincide, resulting in redundant weights. To mitigate the training and memory complexity, we propose a classifier-block-level hierarchical system instead of a network-level one for source camera model classification. Our proposed approach not only results in significantly fewer parameters but also retains the capability to add a new camera model with minimal modification. Thorough experimentation on the publicly available Dresden dataset shows that our proposed approach can achieve the same level of state-of-the-art performance but requires fewer parameters compared to a state-of-the-art network-level hierarchical-based system. 由于互联网基础设施的快速适应、社交媒体和数码相机的日益普及，数字安全已成为一个活跃的研究领域。由于生成图像的工作原理存在固有差异，不同的相机品牌会留下不同的固有处理噪声，这些噪声可用于识别相机品牌。在过去的十年中，人们提出了许多基于信号处理和深度学习的方法来识别这种噪声并将其与图像中的场景细节隔离，以检测源相机品牌。一个突出的解决方案是利用分层分类系统而不是传统的单分类器方法。不同的单独网络用于品牌级和型号级源相机识别。这种方法可以实现更好的扩展，并且只需最少的修改即可向解决方案添加新的相机品牌/型号。然而，使用不同的成熟网络进行品牌和模型级分类会大大增加内存消耗和训练复杂性。此外，从不同网络的初始层提取的低级特征通常是重合的，导致冗余权重。为了减轻训练和内存复杂性，我们提出了一种分类器块级分层系统，而不是用于源相机模型分类的网络级系统。我们提出的方法不仅可以显着减少参数，而且还保留了以最小的修改添加新相机模型的能力。对公开的德累斯顿数据集进行的彻底实验表明，与最先进的网络级分层系统相比，我们提出的方法可以实现相同水平的最先进性能，但需要更少的参数。 本文提出一种基于分层分类块的卷积神经网络，用于源相机模型识别，解决现有方法参数冗余和复杂度高的问题。 Mohammad Zunaed,Shaikh Anowarul Fattah cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Aditya Murali,Deepak Alapatt,Pietro Mascagni,Armine Vardazaryan,Alain Garcia,Nariaki Okamoto,Didier Mutter,Nicolas Padoy
title: Latent Graph Representations for Critical View of Safety Assessment
title_zh: 安全评估批判性观点的潜在图表示
abstract: Assessing the critical view of safety in laparoscopic cholecystectomy requires accurate identification and localization of key anatomical structures, reasoning about their geometric relationships to one another, and determining the quality of their exposure. Prior works have approached this task by including semantic segmentation as an intermediate step, using predicted segmentation masks to then predict the CVS. While these methods are effective, they rely on extremely expensive ground-truth segmentation annotations and tend to fail when the predicted segmentation is incorrect, limiting generalization. In this work, we propose a method for CVS prediction wherein we first represent a surgical image using a disentangled latent scene graph, then process this representation using a graph neural network. Our graph representations explicitly encode semantic information - object location, class information, geometric relations - to improve anatomy-driven reasoning, as well as visual features to retain differentiability and thereby provide robustness to semantic errors. Finally, to address annotation cost, we propose to train our method using only bounding box annotations, incorporating an auxiliary image reconstruction objective to learn fine-grained object boundaries. We show that our method not only outperforms several baseline methods when trained with bounding box annotations, but also scales effectively when trained with segmentation masks, maintaining state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Assessing the critical view of safety in laparoscopic cholecystectomy requires accurate identification and localization of key anatomical structures, reasoning about their geometric relationships to one another, and determining the quality of their exposure. Prior works have approached this task by including semantic segmentation as an intermediate step, using predicted segmentation masks to then predict the CVS. While these methods are effective, they rely on extremely expensive ground-truth segmentation annotations and tend to fail when the predicted segmentation is incorrect, limiting generalization. In this work, we propose a method for CVS prediction wherein we first represent a surgical image using a disentangled latent scene graph, then process this representation using a graph neural network. Our graph representations explicitly encode semantic information - object location, class information, geometric relations - to improve anatomy-driven reasoning, as well as visual features to retain differentiability and thereby provide robustness to semantic errors. Finally, to address annotation cost, we propose to train our method using only bounding box annotations, incorporating an auxiliary image reconstruction objective to learn fine-grained object boundaries. We show that our method not only outperforms several baseline methods when trained with bounding box annotations, but also scales effectively when trained with segmentation masks, maintaining state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 评估腹腔镜胆囊切除术安全性的关键观点需要准确识别和定位关键解剖结构，推理它们彼此之间的几何关系，并确定它们的暴露质量。之前的工作已经通过将语义分割作为中间步骤来完成此任务，然后使用预测的分割掩码来预测 CVS。虽然这些方法很有效，但它们依赖于极其昂贵的真实分割注释，并且当预测的分割不正确时往往会失败，从而限制了泛化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 CVS 预测方法，其中我们首先使用解开的潜在场景图表示手术图像，然后使用图神经网络处理该表示。我们的图形表示显式编码语义信息（对象位置、类信息、几何关系）以改进解剖驱动的推理，以及视觉特征以保留可微性，从而提供对语义错误的鲁棒性。最后，为了解决注释成本，我们建议仅使用边界框注释来训练我们的方法，并结合辅助图像重建目标来学习细粒度的对象边界。我们表明，我们的方法不仅在使用边界框注释进行训练时优于几种基线方法，而且在使用分割掩模进行训练时也能有效地扩展，从而保持最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在图表示的手术安全关键视图预测方法，通过解耦场景图与图神经网络处理，减少对昂贵分割标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖高成本的语义分割标注且对分割错误敏感，导致泛化能力受限，需开发更鲁棒且标注成本更低的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建解耦潜在场景图编码器提取语义与几何关系，结合图神经网络处理，仅使用边界框标注训练并引入辅助图像重建目标学习精细边界。
AI.result: 在仅用边界框标注时优于基线方法，且在分割标注下保持最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式语义编码与鲁棒训练策略，在降低标注成本的同时提升了安全关键视图预测的准确性与稳定性。

authors_text: Wenxin Wang,Boyun Li,Yuanbiao Gou,Peng Hu,Wangmeng Zuo,Xi Peng
title: Relationship Quantification of Image Degradations
title_zh: 图像退化的关系量化
abstract: In this paper, we study two challenging but less-touched problems in image restoration, namely, i) how to quantify the relationship between image degradations and ii) how to improve the performance of a specific restoration task using the quantified relationship. To tackle the first challenge, we proposed a Degradation Relationship Index (DRI) which is defined as the mean drop rate difference in the validation loss between two models which are respectively trained using the anchor degradation and the mixture of the anchor and the auxiliary degradations. Through quantifying the degradation relationship using DRI, we reveal that i) a positive DRI always predicts performance improvement by using the specific degradation as an auxiliary to train models; ii) the degradation proportion is crucial to the image restoration performance. In other words, the restoration performance is improved only if the anchor and the auxiliary degradations are mixed with an appropriate proportion. Based on the observations, we further propose a simple but effective method (dubbed DPD) to estimate whether the given degradation combinations could improve the performance on the anchor degradation with the assistance of the auxiliary degradation. Extensive experimental results verify the effectiveness of our method in dehazing, denoising, deraining, and desnowing. The code will be released after acceptance.
summary: In this paper, we study two challenging but less-touched problems in image restoration, namely, i) how to quantify the relationship between image degradations and ii) how to improve the performance of a specific restoration task using the quantified relationship. To tackle the first challenge, we proposed a Degradation Relationship Index (DRI) which is defined as the mean drop rate difference in the validation loss between two models which are respectively trained using the anchor degradation and the mixture of the anchor and the auxiliary degradations. Through quantifying the degradation relationship using DRI, we reveal that i) a positive DRI always predicts performance improvement by using the specific degradation as an auxiliary to train models; ii) the degradation proportion is crucial to the image restoration performance. In other words, the restoration performance is improved only if the anchor and the auxiliary degradations are mixed with an appropriate proportion. Based on the observations, we further propose a simple but effective method (dubbed DPD) to estimate whether the given degradation combinations could improve the performance on the anchor degradation with the assistance of the auxiliary degradation. Extensive experimental results verify the effectiveness of our method in dehazing, denoising, deraining, and desnowing. The code will be released after acceptance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了图像恢复中两个具有挑战性但较少涉及的问题，即i）如何量化图像退化之间的关系和ii）如何使用量化的关系提高特定恢复任务的性能。为了解决第一个挑战，我们提出了退化关系指数（DRI），它被定义为分别使用锚退化和锚与辅助退化的混合进行训练的两个模型之间验证损失的平均下降率差异。通过使用 DRI 量化退化关系，我们发现 i) 正 DRI 总是通过使用特定退化作为训练模型的辅助来预测性能改进； ii) 退化比例对于图像恢复性能至关重要。换句话说，只有当锚和辅助退化以适当的比例混合时，恢复性能才能得到改善。基于观察结果，我们进一步提出了一种简单但有效的方法（称为 DPD）来估计给定的退化组合是否可以在辅助退化的帮助下提高锚退化的性能。大量的实验结果验证了我们的方法在除雾、去噪、除雨和除雪方面的有效性。代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图像修复中退化关系量化问题，并提出基于退化关系提升修复性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法缺乏对不同退化关系的系统量化分析，且未明确如何利用退化间关系提升特定任务性能。
AI.method: 提出退化关系指数（DRI）量化退化关系，通过对比锚定退化与混合退化模型的验证损失差异，进一步设计DPD方法评估退化组合对性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验验证DRI能有效预测辅助退化对锚定退化任务的性能提升，DPD方法在去雾、去噪、去雨、去雪任务中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 退化比例对图像修复性能至关重要，基于DRI的DPD方法为多退化场景下的模型优化提供了有效指导。

search_text: Relationship Quantification of Image Degradations 图像退化的关系量化 In this paper, we study two challenging but less-touched problems in image restoration, namely, i) how to quantify the relationship between image degradations and ii) how to improve the performance of a specific restoration task using the quantified relationship. To tackle the first challenge, we proposed a Degradation Relationship Index (DRI) which is defined as the mean drop rate difference in the validation loss between two models which are respectively trained using the anchor degradation and the mixture of the anchor and the auxiliary degradations. Through quantifying the degradation relationship using DRI, we reveal that i) a positive DRI always predicts performance improvement by using the specific degradation as an auxiliary to train models; ii) the degradation proportion is crucial to the image restoration performance. In other words, the restoration performance is improved only if the anchor and the auxiliary degradations are mixed with an appropriate proportion. Based on the observations, we further propose a simple but effective method (dubbed DPD) to estimate whether the given degradation combinations could improve the performance on the anchor degradation with the assistance of the auxiliary degradation. Extensive experimental results verify the effectiveness of our method in dehazing, denoising, deraining, and desnowing. The code will be released after acceptance. 在本文中，我们研究了图像恢复中两个具有挑战性但较少涉及的问题，即i）如何量化图像退化之间的关系和ii）如何使用量化的关系提高特定恢复任务的性能。为了解决第一个挑战，我们提出了退化关系指数（DRI），它被定义为分别使用锚退化和锚与辅助退化的混合进行训练的两个模型之间验证损失的平均下降率差异。通过使用 DRI 量化退化关系，我们发现 i) 正 DRI 总是通过使用特定退化作为训练模型的辅助来预测性能改进； ii) 退化比例对于图像恢复性能至关重要。换句话说，只有当锚和辅助退化以适当的比例混合时，恢复性能才能得到改善。基于观察结果，我们进一步提出了一种简单但有效的方法（称为 DPD）来估计给定的退化组合是否可以在辅助退化的帮助下提高锚退化的性能。大量的实验结果验证了我们的方法在除雾、去噪、除雨和除雪方面的有效性。代码将在接受后发布。 本文研究图像修复中退化关系量化问题，并提出基于退化关系提升修复性能的方法。 Wenxin Wang,Boyun Li,Yuanbiao Gou,Peng Hu,Wangmeng Zuo,Xi Peng cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yulu Gan,Yan Bai,Yihang Lou,Xianzheng Ma,Renrui Zhang,Nian Shi,Lin Luo
title: Decorate the Newcomers: Visual Domain Prompt for Continual Test Time Adaptation
title_zh: 装饰新人：视觉领域提示持续测试时间适应
abstract: Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CTTA) aims to adapt the source model to continually changing unlabeled target domains without access to the source data. Existing methods mainly focus on model-based adaptation in a self-training manner, such as predicting pseudo labels for new domain datasets. Since pseudo labels are noisy and unreliable, these methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting and error accumulation when dealing with dynamic data distributions. Motivated by the prompt learning in NLP, in this paper, we propose to learn an image-level visual domain prompt for target domains while having the source model parameters frozen. During testing, the changing target datasets can be adapted to the source model by reformulating the input data with the learned visual prompts. Specifically, we devise two types of prompts, i.e., domains-specific prompts and domains-agnostic prompts, to extract current domain knowledge and maintain the domain-shared knowledge in the continual adaptation. Furthermore, we design a homeostasis-based prompt adaptation strategy to suppress domain-sensitive parameters in domain-invariant prompts to learn domain-shared knowledge more effectively. This transition from the model-dependent paradigm to the model-free one enables us to bypass the catastrophic forgetting and error accumulation problems. Experiments show that our proposed method achieves significant performance gains over state-of-the-art methods on four widely-used benchmarks, including CIFAR-10C, CIFAR-100C, ImageNet-C, and VLCS datasets.
summary: Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CTTA) aims to adapt the source model to continually changing unlabeled target domains without access to the source data. Existing methods mainly focus on model-based adaptation in a self-training manner, such as predicting pseudo labels for new domain datasets. Since pseudo labels are noisy and unreliable, these methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting and error accumulation when dealing with dynamic data distributions. Motivated by the prompt learning in NLP, in this paper, we propose to learn an image-level visual domain prompt for target domains while having the source model parameters frozen. During testing, the changing target datasets can be adapted to the source model by reformulating the input data with the learned visual prompts. Specifically, we devise two types of prompts, i.e., domains-specific prompts and domains-agnostic prompts, to extract current domain knowledge and maintain the domain-shared knowledge in the continual adaptation. Furthermore, we design a homeostasis-based prompt adaptation strategy to suppress domain-sensitive parameters in domain-invariant prompts to learn domain-shared knowledge more effectively. This transition from the model-dependent paradigm to the model-free one enables us to bypass the catastrophic forgetting and error accumulation problems. Experiments show that our proposed method achieves significant performance gains over state-of-the-art methods on four widely-used benchmarks, including CIFAR-10C, CIFAR-100C, ImageNet-C, and VLCS datasets.
abstract_zh: 持续测试时间适应（CTTA）旨在使源模型适应不断变化的未标记目标域，而无需访问源数据。现有方法主要侧重于以自训练方式基于模型的适应，例如预测新领域数据集的伪标签。由于伪标签有噪声且不可靠，这些方法在处理动态数据分布时会遭受灾难性遗忘和错误累积。受 NLP 提示学习的启发，在本文中，我们提出在冻结源模型参数的同时学习目标域的图像级视觉域提示。在测试过程中，可以通过使用学习的视觉提示重新制定输入数据来适应不断变化的目标数据集以适应源模型。具体来说，我们设计了两种类型的提示，即特定于领域的提示和与领域无关的提示，以提取当前领域知识并在持续适应中维护领域共享知识。此外，我们设计了一种基于稳态的提示适应策略，以抑制领域不变提示中的领域敏感参数，从而更有效地学习领域共享知识。从依赖模型的范式到无模型的范式的这种转变使我们能够绕过灾难性遗忘和错误累积问题。实验表明，我们提出的方法在四个广泛使用的基准（包括 CIFAR-10C、CIFAR-100C、ImageNet-C 和 VLCS 数据集）上比最先进的方法取得了显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉领域提示的持续测试时适应方法，通过冻结源模型参数并学习领域特定与无关提示，解决动态目标领域的模型适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖伪标签进行自训练，但噪声伪标签导致灾难性遗忘与误差累积。受NLP提示学习启发，需探索无模型范式以提升持续适应鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计领域特定提示（提取当前领域知识）与领域无关提示（保持共享知识），结合稳态策略抑制敏感参数，通过重构输入数据实现源模型适配。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10C、CIFAR-100C、ImageNet-C和VLCS四个基准数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 视觉领域提示方法有效解决了持续测试时适应中的灾难性遗忘与误差累积问题，为无模型域适应提供了新范式。

authors_text: Cesare Caputo,Michel-Alexandre Cardin,Pudong Ge,Fei Teng,Anna Korre,Ehecatl Antonio del Rio Chanona
title: Design and Planning of Flexible Mobile Micro-Grids Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的灵活移动微电网的设计和规划
abstract: Ongoing risks from climate change have impacted the livelihood of global nomadic communities, and are likely to lead to increased migratory movements in coming years. As a result, mobility considerations are becoming increasingly important in energy systems planning, particularly to achieve energy access in developing countries. Advanced Plug and Play control strategies have been recently developed with such a decentralized framework in mind, more easily allowing for the interconnection of nomadic communities, both to each other and to the main grid. In light of the above, the design and planning strategy of a mobile multi-energy supply system for a nomadic community is investigated in this work. Motivated by the scale and dimensionality of the associated uncertainties, impacting all major design and decision variables over the 30-year planning horizon, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is implemented for the design and planning problem tackled. DRL based solutions are benchmarked against several rigid baseline design options to compare expected performance under uncertainty. The results on a case study for ger communities in Mongolia suggest that mobile nomadic energy systems can be both technically and economically feasible, particularly when considering flexibility, although the degree of spatial dispersion among households is an important limiting factor. Key economic, sustainability and resilience indicators such as Cost, Equivalent Emissions and Total Unmet Load are measured, suggesting potential improvements compared to available baselines of up to 25%, 67% and 76%, respectively. Finally, the decomposition of values of flexibility and plug and play operation is presented using a variation of real options theory, with important implications for both nomadic communities and policymakers focused on enabling their energy access.

As a result, mobility considerations are becoming increasingly important in energy systems planning, particularly to achieve energy access in developing countries. Advanced Plug and Play control strategies have been recently developed with such a decentralized framework in mind, more easily allowing for the interconnection of nomadic communities, both to each other and to the main grid. In light of the above, the design and planning strategy of a mobile multi-energy supply system for a nomadic community is investigated in this work. Motivated by the scale and dimensionality of the associated uncertainties, impacting all major design and decision variables over the 30-year planning horizon, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is implemented for the design and planning problem tackled. DRL based solutions are benchmarked against several rigid baseline design options to compare expected performance under uncertainty. The results on a case study for ger communities in Mongolia suggest that mobile nomadic energy systems can be both technically and economically feasible, particularly when considering flexibility, although the degree of spatial dispersion among households is an important limiting factor. Key economic, sustainability and resilience indicators such as Cost, Equivalent Emissions and Total Unmet Load are measured, suggesting potential improvements compared to available baselines of up to 25%, 67% and 76%, respectively. Finally, the decomposition of values of flexibility and plug and play operation is presented using a variation of real options theory, with important implications for both nomadic communities and policymakers focused on enabling their energy access.
abstract_zh: 气候变化带来的持续风险影响了全球游牧社区的生计，并可能导致未来几年移民流动增加。因此，流动性考虑因素在能源系统规划中变得越来越重要，特别是在发展中国家实现能源获取方面。最近开发了先进的即插即用控制策略，考虑到这种分散的框架，更容易地允许游牧社区相互之间以及与主电网的互连。鉴于上述情况，本工作研究了游牧社区移动多能源供应系统的设计和规划策略。受相关不确定性的规模和维度的推动，影响 30 年规划范围内的所有主要设计和决策变量，深度强化学习 (DRL) 被用于解决设计和规划问题。基于 DRL 的解决方案与几个严格的基线设计选项进行基准比较，以比较不确定性下的预期性能。蒙古包社区案例研究的结果表明，移动游牧能源系统在技术和经济上都是可行的，特别是在考虑灵活性时，尽管家庭之间的空间分散程度是一个重要的限制因素。对成本、当量排放和总未满足负荷等关键经济、可持续性和复原力指标进行了测量，表明与现有基准相比，潜在的改进分别高达 25%、67% 和 76%。最后，使用实物期权理论的变体对灵活性和即插即用操作的价值进行了分解，这对游牧社区和专注于实现能源获取的政策制定者都有重要影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度强化学习（DRL）设计适用于游牧社区的灵活移动微电网系统，以应对气候变化带来的不确定性并提升能源可及性。
AI.motivation: 气候变化加剧了全球游牧社区的生存风险，传统能源规划方法难以适应其流动性需求，需开发灵活且可持续的能源系统以保障发展中国家能源供应。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习处理30年规划周期内的多维度不确定性，通过对比刚性基准方案评估性能，并结合实物期权理论分解灵活性与即插即用操作的价值。
AI.result: 蒙古游牧社区案例研究表明，移动能源系统在成本、碳排放和未满足负荷指标上分别较基准方案提升25%、67%和76%，但家庭空间分散性是主要限制因素。
AI.conclusion: DRL方法可有效提升游牧社区能源系统的经济性与韧性，灵活性设计对政策制定者和社区能源规划具有重要指导意义。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用深度强化学习（DRL）设计适用于游牧社区的灵活移动微电网系统，以应对气候变化带来的不确定性并提升能源可及性。

search_text: Design and Planning of Flexible Mobile Micro-Grids Using Deep Reinforcement Learning 使用深度强化学习的灵活移动微电网的设计和规划 Ongoing risks from climate change have impacted the livelihood of global nomadic communities, and are likely to lead to increased migratory movements in coming years. As a result, mobility considerations are becoming increasingly important in energy systems planning, particularly to achieve energy access in developing countries. Advanced Plug and Play control strategies have been recently developed with such a decentralized framework in mind, more easily allowing for the interconnection of nomadic communities, both to each other and to the main grid. In light of the above, the design and planning strategy of a mobile multi-energy supply system for a nomadic community is investigated in this work. Motivated by the scale and dimensionality of the associated uncertainties, impacting all major design and decision variables over the 30-year planning horizon, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is implemented for the design and planning problem tackled. DRL based solutions are benchmarked against several rigid baseline design options to compare expected performance under uncertainty. The results on a case study for ger communities in Mongolia suggest that mobile nomadic energy systems can be both technically and economically feasible, particularly when considering flexibility, although the degree of spatial dispersion among households is an important limiting factor. Key economic, sustainability and resilience indicators such as Cost, Equivalent Emissions and Total Unmet Load are measured, suggesting potential improvements compared to available baselines of up to 25%, 67% and 76%, respectively. Finally, the decomposition of values of flexibility and plug and play operation is presented using a variation of real options theory, with important implications for both nomadic communities and policymakers focused on enabling their energy access. 气候变化带来的持续风险影响了全球游牧社区的生计，并可能导致未来几年移民流动增加。因此，流动性考虑因素在能源系统规划中变得越来越重要，特别是在发展中国家实现能源获取方面。最近开发了先进的即插即用控制策略，考虑到这种分散的框架，更容易地允许游牧社区相互之间以及与主电网的互连。鉴于上述情况，本工作研究了游牧社区移动多能源供应系统的设计和规划策略。受相关不确定性的规模和维度的推动，影响 30 年规划范围内的所有主要设计和决策变量，深度强化学习 (DRL) 被用于解决设计和规划问题。基于 DRL 的解决方案与几个严格的基线设计选项进行基准比较，以比较不确定性下的预期性能。蒙古包社区案例研究的结果表明，移动游牧能源系统在技术和经济上都是可行的，特别是在考虑灵活性时，尽管家庭之间的空间分散程度是一个重要的限制因素。对成本、当量排放和总未满足负荷等关键经济、可持续性和复原力指标进行了测量，表明与现有基准相比，潜在的改进分别高达 25%、67% 和 76%。最后，使用实物期权理论的变体对灵活性和即插即用操作的价值进行了分解，这对游牧社区和专注于实现能源获取的政策制定者都有重要影响。 本文提出利用深度强化学习（DRL）设计适用于游牧社区的灵活移动微电网系统，以应对气候变化带来的不确定性并提升能源可及性。 Cesare Caputo,Michel-Alexandre Cardin,Pudong Ge,Fei Teng,Anna Korre,Ehecatl Antonio del Rio Chanona eess.SY,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiageng Zhong,Ming Li,Hanqi Zhang,Jiangying Qin
title: Combining Photogrammetric Computer Vision and Semantic Segmentation for Fine-grained Understanding of Coral Reef Growth under Climate Change
title_zh: 结合摄影测量计算机视觉和语义分割，精细了解气候变化下的珊瑚礁生长
comment: Accepted to the WACV 2023 workshop, 1st Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi)
comments: Accepted to the WACV 2023 workshop, 1st Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi)
abstract: Corals are the primary habitat-building life-form on reefs that support a quarter of the species in the ocean. A coral reef ecosystem usually consists of reefs, each of which is like a tall building in any city. These reef-building corals secrete hard calcareous exoskeletons that give them structural rigidity, and are also a prerequisite for our accurate 3D modeling and semantic mapping using advanced photogrammetric computer vision and machine learning. Underwater videography as a modern underwater remote sensing tool is a high-resolution coral habitat survey and mapping technique. In this paper, detailed 3D mesh models, digital surface models and orthophotos of the coral habitat are generated from the collected coral images and underwater control points. Meanwhile, a novel pixel-wise semantic segmentation approach of orthophotos is performed by advanced deep learning. Finally, the semantic map is mapped into 3D space. For the first time, 3D fine-grained semantic modeling and rugosity evaluation of coral reefs have been completed at millimeter (mm) accuracy. This provides a new and powerful method for understanding the processes and characteristics of coral reef change at high spatial and temporal resolution under climate change.

Meanwhile, a novel pixel-wise semantic segmentation approach of orthophotos is performed by advanced deep learning. Finally, the semantic map is mapped into 3D space. For the first time, 3D fine-grained semantic modeling and rugosity evaluation of coral reefs have been completed at millimeter (mm) accuracy. abstract_zh: 珊瑚是珊瑚礁上主要的栖息地构建生命形式，支撑着海洋中四分之一的物种。珊瑚礁生态系统通常由珊瑚礁组成，每个珊瑚礁就像城市​​中的一座高楼。这些造礁珊瑚会分泌坚硬的钙质外骨骼，赋予它们结构刚性，也是我们使用先进的摄影测量计算机视觉和机器学习进行精确 3D 建模和语义映射的先决条件。水下摄像作为现代水下遥感工具，是一种高分辨率珊瑚栖息地调查和测绘技术。在本文中，根据收集的珊瑚图像和水下控制点生成了珊瑚栖息地的详细 3D 网格模型、数字表面模型和正射影像。同时，通过先进的深度学习执行了一种新颖的正射影像像素级语义分割方法。最后，将语义图映射到 3D 空间。首次以毫米（mm）精度完成了珊瑚礁的 3D 细粒度语义建模和粗糙度评估。这为了解气候变化下高时空分辨率的珊瑚礁变化过程和特征提供了一种新的、有力的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文结合摄影测量计算机视觉与语义分割技术，实现对气候变化下珊瑚礁生长的高精度三维细粒度建模与分析。
AI.motivation: 珊瑚礁是海洋生物的重要栖息地，其结构变化对气候变化高度敏感。传统方法难以实现高精度的三维建模与语义解析，亟需新技术支持珊瑚礁生态动态的精细化研究。
AI.method: 基于水下视频采集与控制点数据，生成珊瑚栖息地的三维网格模型、数字表面模型及正射影像；采用深度学习实现正射影像像素级语义分割，并将语义信息映射至三维空间。
AI.result: 首次实现毫米级精度的珊瑚礁三维细粒度语义建模与粗糙度评估，为高时空分辨率研究珊瑚礁变化过程提供新方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合摄影测量与深度学习技术，显著提升了珊瑚礁生态变化监测的精度与细粒度，为气候变化影响评估提供了关键技术支撑。

authors_text: Zanlin Ni,Yulin Wang,Jiangwei Yu,Haojun Jiang,Yue Cao,Gao Huang
title: Deep Incubation: Training Large Models by Divide-and-Conquering
title_zh: 深度孵化：通过分而治之的方式训练大型模型
abstract: Recent years have witnessed a remarkable success of large deep learning models. However, training these models is challenging due to high computational costs, painfully slow convergence, and overfitting issues. In this paper, we present Deep Incubation, a novel approach that enables the efficient and effective training of large models by dividing them into smaller sub-modules that can be trained separately and assembled seamlessly. A key challenge for implementing this idea is to ensure the compatibility of the independently trained sub-modules. To address this issue, we first introduce a global, shared meta model, which is leveraged to implicitly link all the modules together, and can be designed as an extremely small network with negligible computational overhead. Then we propose a module incubation algorithm, which trains each sub-module to replace the corresponding component of the meta model and accomplish a given learning task. Despite the simplicity, our approach effectively encourages each sub-module to be aware of its role in the target large model, such that the finally-learned sub-modules can collaborate with each other smoothly after being assembled. Empirically, our method outperforms end-to-end (E2E) training in terms of both final accuracy and training efficiency. For example, on top of ViT-Huge, it improves the accuracy by 2.7% on ImageNet or achieves similar performance with 4x less training time. Notably, the gains are significant for downstream tasks as well (e.g., object detection and image segmentation on COCO and ADE20K). Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Deep-Incubation.
summary: Recent years have witnessed a remarkable success of large deep learning models. However, training these models is challenging due to high computational costs, painfully slow convergence, and overfitting issues. In this paper, we present Deep Incubation, a novel approach that enables the efficient and effective training of large models by dividing them into smaller sub-modules that can be trained separately and assembled seamlessly. A key challenge for implementing this idea is to ensure the compatibility of the independently trained sub-modules. To address this issue, we first introduce a global, shared meta model, which is leveraged to implicitly link all the modules together, and can be designed as an extremely small network with negligible computational overhead. Then we propose a module incubation algorithm, which trains each sub-module to replace the corresponding component of the meta model and accomplish a given learning task. Despite the simplicity, our approach effectively encourages each sub-module to be aware of its role in the target large model, such that the finally-learned sub-modules can collaborate with each other smoothly after being assembled. Empirically, our method outperforms end-to-end (E2E) training in terms of both final accuracy and training efficiency. For example, on top of ViT-Huge, it improves the accuracy by 2.7% on ImageNet or achieves similar performance with 4x less training time. Notably, the gains are significant for downstream tasks as well (e.g., object detection and image segmentation on COCO and ADE20K). Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Deep-Incubation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型深度学习模型取得了巨大成功。然而，由于计算成本高、收敛速度慢以及过度拟合问题，训练这些模型具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了深度孵化，这是一种新颖的方法，通过将大型模型划分为可以单独训练和无缝组装的较小子模块，可以高效且有效地训练大型模型。实现这一想法的一个关键挑战是确保独立训练的子模块的兼容性。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入一个全局的、共享的元模型，它用于隐式地将所有模块链接在一起，并且可以设计为一个非常小的网络，计算开销可以忽略不计。然后，我们提出了一种模块孵化算法，该算法训练每个子模块来替换元模型的相应组件并完成给定的学习任务。尽管很简单，但我们的方法有效地鼓励每个子模块了解其在目标大模型中的作用，以便最终学习的子模块在组装后可以顺利地相互协作。根据经验，我们的方法在最终准确性和训练效率方面都优于端到端（E2E）训练。例如，在 ViT-Huge 的基础上，它在 ImageNet 上将准确率提高了 2.7%，或者以减少 4 倍的训练时间实现了类似的性能。值得注意的是，对于下游任务（例如 COCO 和 ADE20K 上的对象检测和图像分割）来说，收益也很显着。代码可在 https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Deep-Incubation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Incubation的新方法，通过将大型深度学习模型分解为独立训练的子模块并利用共享元模型进行无缝集成，以提高训练效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 大型深度学习模型的训练面临计算成本高、收敛速度慢和过拟合等问题，传统端到端训练难以高效处理这些挑战。
AI.method: 通过将模型分割为子模块并分别训练，引入一个轻量级共享元模型隐式连接各模块，再通过模块孵化算法使子模块逐步替代元模型组件完成学习任务。
AI.result: 在ViT-Huge模型上，ImageNet准确率提升2.7%或训练时间减少4倍；在COCO和ADE20K等下游任务中也表现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: Deep Incubation通过模块化训练策略有效解决了大型模型训练的效率与效果问题，为模型设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Deep Incubation: Training Large Models by Divide-and-Conquering 深度孵化：通过分而治之的方式训练大型模型 Recent years have witnessed a remarkable success of large deep learning models. However, training these models is challenging due to high computational costs, painfully slow convergence, and overfitting issues. In this paper, we present Deep Incubation, a novel approach that enables the efficient and effective training of large models by dividing them into smaller sub-modules that can be trained separately and assembled seamlessly. A key challenge for implementing this idea is to ensure the compatibility of the independently trained sub-modules. To address this issue, we first introduce a global, shared meta model, which is leveraged to implicitly link all the modules together, and can be designed as an extremely small network with negligible computational overhead. Then we propose a module incubation algorithm, which trains each sub-module to replace the corresponding component of the meta model and accomplish a given learning task. Despite the simplicity, our approach effectively encourages each sub-module to be aware of its role in the target large model, such that the finally-learned sub-modules can collaborate with each other smoothly after being assembled. Empirically, our method outperforms end-to-end (E2E) training in terms of both final accuracy and training efficiency. For example, on top of ViT-Huge, it improves the accuracy by 2.7% on ImageNet or achieves similar performance with 4x less training time. Notably, the gains are significant for downstream tasks as well (e.g., object detection and image segmentation on COCO and ADE20K). Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Deep-Incubation. 近年来，大型深度学习模型取得了巨大成功。然而，由于计算成本高、收敛速度慢以及过度拟合问题，训练这些模型具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了深度孵化，这是一种新颖的方法，通过将大型模型划分为可以单独训练和无缝组装的较小子模块，可以高效且有效地训练大型模型。实现这一想法的一个关键挑战是确保独立训练的子模块的兼容性。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入一个全局的、共享的元模型，它用于隐式地将所有模块链接在一起，并且可以设计为一个非常小的网络，计算开销可以忽略不计。然后，我们提出了一种模块孵化算法，该算法训练每个子模块来替换元模型的相应组件并完成给定的学习任务。尽管很简单，但我们的方法有效地鼓励每个子模块了解其在目标大模型中的作用，以便最终学习的子模块在组装后可以顺利地相互协作。根据经验，我们的方法在最终准确性和训练效率方面都优于端到端（E2E）训练。例如，在 ViT-Huge 的基础上，它在 ImageNet 上将准确率提高了 2.7%，或者以减少 4 倍的训练时间实现了类似的性能。值得注意的是，对于下游任务（例如 COCO 和 ADE20K 上的对象检测和图像分割）来说，收益也很显着。代码可在 https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/Deep-Incubation 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Deep Incubation的新方法，通过将大型深度学习模型分解为独立训练的子模块并利用共享元模型进行无缝集成，以提高训练效率和效果。 Zanlin Ni,Yulin Wang,Jiangwei Yu,Haojun Jiang,Yue Cao,Gao Huang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziheng Yan,Yuankai Qi,Guorong Li,Xinyan Liu,Weigang Zhang,Qingming Huang,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: Progressive Multi-resolution Loss for Crowd Counting
title_zh: 用于人群计数的渐进式多分辨率损失
abstract: Crowd counting is usually handled in a density map regression fashion, which is supervised via a L2 loss between the predicted density map and ground truth. To effectively regulate models, various improved L2 loss functions have been proposed to find a better correspondence between predicted density and annotation positions. In this paper, we propose to predict the density map at one resolution but measure the density map at multiple resolutions. By maximizing the posterior probability in such a setting, we obtain a log-formed multi-resolution L2-difference loss, where the traditional single-resolution L2 loss is its particular case. We mathematically prove it is superior to a single-resolution L2 loss. Without bells and whistles, the proposed loss substantially improves several baselines and performs favorably compared to state-of-the-art methods on four crowd counting datasets, ShanghaiTech A & B, UCF-QNRF, and JHU-Crowd++.
summary: Crowd counting is usually handled in a density map regression fashion, which is supervised via a L2 loss between the predicted density map and ground truth. To effectively regulate models, various improved L2 loss functions have been proposed to find a better correspondence between predicted density and annotation positions. In this paper, we propose to predict the density map at one resolution but measure the density map at multiple resolutions. By maximizing the posterior probability in such a setting, we obtain a log-formed multi-resolution L2-difference loss, where the traditional single-resolution L2 loss is its particular case. We mathematically prove it is superior to a single-resolution L2 loss. Without bells and whistles, the proposed loss substantially improves several baselines and performs favorably compared to state-of-the-art methods on four crowd counting datasets, ShanghaiTech A & B, UCF-QNRF, and JHU-Crowd++.
abstract_zh: 人群计数通常以密度图回归方式处理，通过预测密度图和地面实况之间的 L2 损失进行监督。为了有效地调节模型，人们提出了各种改进的 L2 损失函数，以找到预测密度和注释位置之间更好的对应关系。在本文中，我们建议以一种分辨率预测密度图，但以多种分辨率测量密度图。通过在这种设置下最大化后验概率，我们获得了对数形式的多分辨率 L2 差异损失，其中传统的单分辨率 L2 损失是其特殊情况。我们从数学上证明它优于单分辨率 L2 损失。在没有花哨的情况下，所提出的损失大大改善了几个基线，并且与四个人群计数数据集（上海科技大学 A & B、UCF-QNRF 和 JHU-Crowd++）上的最先进方法相比，表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式多分辨率损失函数，用于改进人群计数任务中的密度图回归方法。
AI.motivation: 传统单分辨率L2损失在人群计数中存在局限性，难以准确捕捉不同尺度下的密度分布特征，需通过多分辨率分析提升模型性能。
AI.method: 预测单一分辨率密度图，但通过多分辨率视角计算损失，推导出对数形式的多分辨率L2差分损失函数，并数学证明其优于单分辨率损失。
AI.result: 在ShanghaiTech A/B、UCF-QNRF和JHU-Crowd++数据集上显著优于多个基线模型及现有最先进方法，且无需额外模块。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率损失函数能有效提升人群计数精度，为密度图回归提供了理论支撑和实用改进方案。

authors_text: Zizhang Wu,Tianhao Xu,Fan Wang,Xiaoquan Wang,Jing Song
title: Complete Solution for Vehicle Re-ID in Surround-view Camera System
title_zh: 环视摄像系统中车辆重新识别的完整解决方案
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.16503
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.16503
abstract: Vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) is a critical component of the autonomous driving perception system, and research in this area has accelerated in recent years. However, there is yet no perfect solution to the vehicle re-identification issue associated with the car's surround-view camera system. Our analysis identifies two significant issues in the aforementioned scenario: i) It is difficult to identify the same vehicle in many picture frames due to the unique construction of the fisheye camera. ii) The appearance of the same vehicle when seen via the surround vision system's several cameras is rather different. To overcome these issues, we suggest an integrative vehicle Re-ID solution method. On the one hand, we provide a technique for determining the consistency of the tracking box drift with respect to the target. On the other hand, we combine a Re-ID network based on the attention mechanism with spatial limitations to increase performance in situations involving multiple cameras. Finally, our approach combines state-of-the-art accuracy with real-time performance. We will soon make the source code and annotated fisheye dataset available.
summary: Vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) is a critical component of the autonomous driving perception system, and research in this area has accelerated in recent years. However, there is yet no perfect solution to the vehicle re-identification issue associated with the car's surround-view camera system. Our analysis identifies two significant issues in the aforementioned scenario: i) It is difficult to identify the same vehicle in many picture frames due to the unique construction of the fisheye camera. ii) The appearance of the same vehicle when seen via the surround vision system's several cameras is rather different. To overcome these issues, we suggest an integrative vehicle Re-ID solution method. On the one hand, we provide a technique for determining the consistency of the tracking box drift with respect to the target. On the other hand, we combine a Re-ID network based on the attention mechanism with spatial limitations to increase performance in situations involving multiple cameras. Finally, our approach combines state-of-the-art accuracy with real-time performance. We will soon make the source code and annotated fisheye dataset available.
abstract_zh: 车辆重识别（Re-ID）是自动驾驶感知系统的关键组成部分，近年来该领域的研究不断加速。然而，对于与汽车环视摄像系统相关的车辆重新识别问题，目前还没有完美的解决方案。我们的分析发现了上述场景中的两个重要问题：i）由于鱼眼相机的独特结构，很难在许多图片帧中识别同一辆车。 ii) 同一辆车通过环视系统的多个摄像头看到的外观有很大不同。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种集成的车辆重新识别解决方案。一方面，我们提供了一种确定跟踪框漂移相对于目标的一致性的技术。另一方面，我们将基于注意力机制的 Re-ID 网络与空间限制相结合，以提高涉及多个摄像机的情况下的性能。最后，我们的方法将最先进的准确性与实时性能结合起来。我们很快将提供源代码和带注释的鱼眼数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对环绕视图摄像头系统的车辆重识别（Re-ID）完整解决方案，以解决该场景下的识别难题。
AI.motivation: 环绕视图摄像头系统因鱼眼镜头结构导致车辆在多帧图像中难以识别，且多摄像头视角下同一车辆外观差异显著，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出跟踪框漂移一致性判定技术，并结合基于注意力机制与空间约束的Re-ID网络，以应对多摄像头视角差异与鱼眼镜头畸变问题。
AI.result: 方法在保持实时性的同时达到先进精度，后续将公开源代码与标注鱼眼数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方案有效解决了环绕视图系统中车辆Re-ID的挑战，在精度与实时性上取得平衡，为自动驾驶感知系统提供可靠支持。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方案有效解决了环绕视图系统中车辆Re-ID的挑战，在精度与实时性上取得平衡，为自动驾驶感知系统提供可靠支持。

search_text: Complete Solution for Vehicle Re-ID in Surround-view Camera System 环视摄像系统中车辆重新识别的完整解决方案 Vehicle re-identification (Re-ID) is a critical component of the autonomous driving perception system, and research in this area has accelerated in recent years. However, there is yet no perfect solution to the vehicle re-identification issue associated with the car's surround-view camera system. Our analysis identifies two significant issues in the aforementioned scenario: i) It is difficult to identify the same vehicle in many picture frames due to the unique construction of the fisheye camera. ii) The appearance of the same vehicle when seen via the surround vision system's several cameras is rather different. To overcome these issues, we suggest an integrative vehicle Re-ID solution method. On the one hand, we provide a technique for determining the consistency of the tracking box drift with respect to the target. On the other hand, we combine a Re-ID network based on the attention mechanism with spatial limitations to increase performance in situations involving multiple cameras. Finally, our approach combines state-of-the-art accuracy with real-time performance. We will soon make the source code and annotated fisheye dataset available. 车辆重识别（Re-ID）是自动驾驶感知系统的关键组成部分，近年来该领域的研究不断加速。然而，对于与汽车环视摄像系统相关的车辆重新识别问题，目前还没有完美的解决方案。我们的分析发现了上述场景中的两个重要问题：i）由于鱼眼相机的独特结构，很难在许多图片帧中识别同一辆车。 ii) 同一辆车通过环视系统的多个摄像头看到的外观有很大不同。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种集成的车辆重新识别解决方案。一方面，我们提供了一种确定跟踪框漂移相对于目标的一致性的技术。另一方面，我们将基于注意力机制的 Re-ID 网络与空间限制相结合，以提高涉及多个摄像机的情况下的性能。最后，我们的方法将最先进的准确性与实时性能结合起来。我们很快将提供源代码和带注释的鱼眼数据集。 本文提出了一种针对环绕视图摄像头系统的车辆重识别（Re-ID）完整解决方案，以解决该场景下的识别难题。 Zizhang Wu,Tianhao Xu,Fan Wang,Xiaoquan Wang,Jing Song cs.CV

authors_text: Fabian Hart,Ostap Okhrin
title: Enhanced method for reinforcement learning based dynamic obstacle avoidance by assessment of collision risk
title_zh: 基于强化学习的碰撞风险评估动态避障增强方法
abstract: In the field of autonomous robots, reinforcement learning (RL) is an increasingly used method to solve the task of dynamic obstacle avoidance for mobile robots, autonomous ships, and drones. A common practice to train those agents is to use a training environment with random initialization of agent and obstacles. Such approaches might suffer from a low coverage of high-risk scenarios in training, leading to impaired final performance of obstacle avoidance. This paper proposes a general training environment where we gain control over the difficulty of the obstacle avoidance task by using short training episodes and assessing the difficulty by two metrics: The number of obstacles and a collision risk metric. We found that shifting the training towards a greater task difficulty can massively increase the final performance. A baseline agent, using a traditional training environment based on random initialization of agent and obstacles and longer training episodes, leads to a significantly weaker performance. To prove the generalizability of the proposed approach, we designed two realistic use cases: A mobile robot and a maritime ship under the threat of approaching obstacles. In both applications, the previous results can be confirmed, which emphasizes the general usability of the proposed approach, detached from a specific application context and independent of the agent's dynamics. We further added Gaussian noise to the sensor signals, resulting in only a marginal degradation of performance and thus indicating solid robustness of the trained agent.
summary: In the field of autonomous robots, reinforcement learning (RL) is an increasingly used method to solve the task of dynamic obstacle avoidance for mobile robots, autonomous ships, and drones. A common practice to train those agents is to use a training environment with random initialization of agent and obstacles. Such approaches might suffer from a low coverage of high-risk scenarios in training, leading to impaired final performance of obstacle avoidance. This paper proposes a general training environment where we gain control over the difficulty of the obstacle avoidance task by using short training episodes and assessing the difficulty by two metrics: The number of obstacles and a collision risk metric. We found that shifting the training towards a greater task difficulty can massively increase the final performance. A baseline agent, using a traditional training environment based on random initialization of agent and obstacles and longer training episodes, leads to a significantly weaker performance. To prove the generalizability of the proposed approach, we designed two realistic use cases: A mobile robot and a maritime ship under the threat of approaching obstacles. In both applications, the previous results can be confirmed, which emphasizes the general usability of the proposed approach, detached from a specific application context and independent of the agent's dynamics. We further added Gaussian noise to the sensor signals, resulting in only a marginal degradation of performance and thus indicating solid robustness of the trained agent.
abstract_zh: 在自主机器人领域，强化学习（RL）是越来越多地使用的方法来解决移动机器人、自主船舶和无人机的动态避障任务。训练这些智能体的常见做法是使用随机初始化智能体和障碍物的训练环境。此类方法可能会受到训练中高风险场景覆盖率较低的影响，从而导致避障的最终性能受损。本文提出了一个通用的训练环境，我们通过使用短训练集并通过两个指标评估难度来控制避障任务的难度：障碍物数量和碰撞风险指标。我们发现，将训练转向更大的任务难度可以极大地提高最终表现。基线智能体使用基于智能体和障碍物随机初始化的传统训练环境以及较长的训练周期，导致性能明显较差。为了证明所提出方法的普遍性，我们设计了两个现实用例：移动机器人和受到接近障碍物威胁的海船。在这两个应用中，之前的结果都可以得到证实，这强调了所提出的方法的一般可用性，脱离了特定的应用上下文并且独立于代理的动态。我们进一步向传感器信号添加高斯噪声，仅导致性能略微下降，从而表明训练有素的智能体具有坚实的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的基于强化学习的动态避障方法，通过评估碰撞风险提升移动机器人和船舶的避障性能。
AI.motivation: 传统随机初始化训练环境导致高风险场景覆盖不足，影响避障算法性能，需设计更有效的训练方法。
AI.method: 构建可控难度的训练环境，通过短回合训练和障碍物数量/碰撞风险双指标评估，强化高风险场景学习。
AI.result: 任务难度提升使避障性能显著优于基线方法，两个实际案例验证通用性，传感器噪声仅造成轻微性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有跨应用场景的通用性，与代理动力学无关，且具备良好的鲁棒性，可有效提升动态避障能力。

authors_text: Young-Jun Lee,Byungsoo Ko,Han-Gyu Kim,Jonghwan Hyeon,Ho-Jin Choi
title: DialogCC: An Automated Pipeline for Creating High-Quality Multi-Modal Dialogue Dataset
title_zh: DialogCC：用于创建高质量多模态对话数据集的自动化管道
abstract: As sharing images in an instant message is a crucial factor, there has been active research on learning an image-text multi-modal dialogue models. However, training a well-generalized multi-modal dialogue model remains challenging due to the low quality and limited diversity of images per dialogue in existing multi-modal dialogue datasets. In this paper, we propose an automated pipeline to construct a multi-modal dialogue dataset, ensuring both dialogue quality and image diversity without requiring minimum human effort. In our pipeline, to guarantee the coherence between images and dialogue, we prompt GPT-4 to infer potential image-sharing moments - specifically, the utterance, speaker, rationale, and image description. Furthermore, we leverage CLIP similarity to maintain consistency between aligned multiple images to the utterance. Through this pipeline, we introduce DialogCC, a high-quality and diverse multi-modal dialogue dataset that surpasses existing datasets in terms of quality and diversity in human evaluation. Our comprehensive experiments highlight that when multi-modal dialogue models are trained using our dataset, their generalization performance on unseen dialogue datasets is significantly enhanced. We make our source code and dataset publicly available.
summary: As sharing images in an instant message is a crucial factor, there has been active research on learning an image-text multi-modal dialogue models. However, training a well-generalized multi-modal dialogue model remains challenging due to the low quality and limited diversity of images per dialogue in existing multi-modal dialogue datasets. In this paper, we propose an automated pipeline to construct a multi-modal dialogue dataset, ensuring both dialogue quality and image diversity without requiring minimum human effort. In our pipeline, to guarantee the coherence between images and dialogue, we prompt GPT-4 to infer potential image-sharing moments - specifically, the utterance, speaker, rationale, and image description. Furthermore, we leverage CLIP similarity to maintain consistency between aligned multiple images to the utterance. Through this pipeline, we introduce DialogCC, a high-quality and diverse multi-modal dialogue dataset that surpasses existing datasets in terms of quality and diversity in human evaluation. Our comprehensive experiments highlight that when multi-modal dialogue models are trained using our dataset, their generalization performance on unseen dialogue datasets is significantly enhanced. We make our source code and dataset publicly available.
abstract_zh: 由于在即时消息中共享图像是一个关键因素，因此人们对学习图像-文本多模态对话模型进行了积极的研究。然而，由于现有多模态对话数据集中每个对话的图像质量低且多样性有限，训练通用的多模态对话模型仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动化管道来构建多模式对话数据集，无需最少的人力即可确保对话质量和图像多样性。在我们的流程中，为了保证图像和对话之间的连贯性，我们提示 GPT-4 推断潜在的图像共享时刻 - 具体来说，是话语、说话者、基本原理和图像描述。此外，我们利用 CLIP 相似性来保持对齐的多个图像与话语之间的一致性。通过这个管道，我们引入了 DialogCC，这是一个高质量且多样化的多模态对话数据集，它在人类评估的质量和多样性方面超越了现有数据集。我们的综合实验强调，当使用我们的数据集训练多模态对话模型时，它们在未见过的对话数据集上的泛化性能显着增强。我们公开源代码和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化流程DialogCC，用于构建高质量且多样化的多模态对话数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态对话数据集存在图像质量低、多样性不足的问题，限制了模型的泛化能力，需减少人工干预以提升数据质量。
AI.method: 通过GPT-4推断图像共享时刻（包括对话内容、说话者、理由及图像描述），结合CLIP相似度保持图像与对话的一致性，自动化生成数据集。
AI.result: DialogCC在人工评估中优于现有数据集，使用该数据集训练的模型在未见数据上的泛化性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 自动化流程有效生成高质量多模态对话数据，提升模型性能，代码与数据集已公开。

Furthermore, we leverage CLIP similarity to maintain consistency between aligned multiple images to the utterance. Through this pipeline, we introduce DialogCC, a high-quality and diverse multi-modal dialogue dataset that surpasses existing datasets in terms of quality and diversity in human evaluation. Our comprehensive experiments highlight that when multi-modal dialogue models are trained using our dataset, their generalization performance on unseen dialogue datasets is significantly enhanced. We make our source code and dataset publicly available. 由于在即时消息中共享图像是一个关键因素，因此人们对学习图像-文本多模态对话模型进行了积极的研究。然而，由于现有多模态对话数据集中每个对话的图像质量低且多样性有限，训练通用的多模态对话模型仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动化管道来构建多模式对话数据集，无需最少的人力即可确保对话质量和图像多样性。在我们的流程中，为了保证图像和对话之间的连贯性，我们提示 GPT-4 推断潜在的图像共享时刻 - 具体来说，是话语、说话者、基本原理和图像描述。此外，我们利用 CLIP 相似性来保持对齐的多个图像与话语之间的一致性。通过这个管道，我们引入了 DialogCC，这是一个高质量且多样化的多模态对话数据集，它在人类评估的质量和多样性方面超越了现有数据集。我们的综合实验强调，当使用我们的数据集训练多模态对话模型时，它们在未见过的对话数据集上的泛化性能显着增强。我们公开源代码和数据集。 本文提出一种自动化流程DialogCC，用于构建高质量且多样化的多模态对话数据集。 Young-Jun Lee,Byungsoo Ko,Han-Gyu Kim,Jonghwan Hyeon,Ho-Jin Choi cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Zizhang Wu,Xinyuan Chen,Jizheng Wang,Xiaoquan Wang,Yuanzhu Gan,Muqing Fang,Tianhao Xu
title: OCR-RTPS: An OCR-based real-time positioning system for the valet parking
title_zh: OCR-RTPS：基于OCR的代客泊车实时定位系统
abstract: Obtaining the position of ego-vehicle is a crucial prerequisite for automatic control and path planning in the field of autonomous driving. Most existing positioning systems rely on GPS, RTK, or wireless signals, which are arduous to provide effective localization under weak signal conditions. This paper proposes a real-time positioning system based on the detection of the parking numbers as they are unique positioning marks in the parking lot scene. It does not only can help with the positioning with open area, but also run independently under isolation environment. The result tested on both public datasets and self-collected dataset show that the system outperforms others in both performances and applies in practice. In addition, the code and dataset will release later.
summary: Obtaining the position of ego-vehicle is a crucial prerequisite for automatic control and path planning in the field of autonomous driving. Most existing positioning systems rely on GPS, RTK, or wireless signals, which are arduous to provide effective localization under weak signal conditions. This paper proposes a real-time positioning system based on the detection of the parking numbers as they are unique positioning marks in the parking lot scene. It does not only can help with the positioning with open area, but also run independently under isolation environment. The result tested on both public datasets and self-collected dataset show that the system outperforms others in both performances and applies in practice. In addition, the code and dataset will release later.
abstract_zh: 获取自我车辆的位置是自动驾驶领域自动控制和路径规划的重要前提。现有的定位系统大多依赖GPS、RTK或无线信号，在弱信号条件下很难提供有效的定位。由于停车位是停车场场景中唯一的定位标记，本文提出了一种基于停车位检测的实时定位系统。不仅可以帮助空旷区域定位，还可以在隔离环境下独立运行。在公共数据集和自采集数据集上的测试结果表明，该系统在性能和实际应用方面均优于其他系统。另外，代码和数据集将在稍后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于OCR的实时定位系统OCR-RTPS，通过识别停车场编号实现车辆定位，解决传统定位方法在弱信号环境下的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有GPS/RTK等定位技术在弱信号场景下失效，需开发无需依赖无线信号的独立定位方案以满足自动驾驶需求。
AI.method: 利用OCR技术检测停车场场景中的唯一标识物（停车编号），通过实时图像识别实现车辆精确定位。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自建数据集测试中，系统性能优于现有方法，验证了其在开放区域和隔离环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OCR-RTPS系统为弱信号场景提供了可靠定位方案，具备实际应用价值，后续将开源代码与数据集促进技术复用。

authors_text: Byungsoo Ko,Han-Gyu Kim,Byeongho Heo,Sangdoo Yun,Sanghyuk Chun,Geonmo Gu,Wonjae Kim
title: Group Generalized Mean Pooling for Vision Transformer
title_zh: Vision Transformer 的组广义均值池化
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) extracts the final representation from either class token or an average of all patch tokens, following the architecture of Transformer in Natural Language Processing (NLP) or Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in computer vision. However, studies for the best way of aggregating the patch tokens are still limited to average pooling, while widely-used pooling strategies, such as max and GeM pooling, can be considered. Despite their effectiveness, the existing pooling strategies do not consider the architecture of ViT and the channel-wise difference in the activation maps, aggregating the crucial and trivial channels with the same importance. In this paper, we present Group Generalized Mean (GGeM) pooling as a simple yet powerful pooling strategy for ViT. GGeM divides the channels into groups and computes GeM pooling with a shared pooling parameter per group. As ViT groups the channels via a multi-head attention mechanism, grouping the channels by GGeM leads to lower head-wise dependence while amplifying important channels on the activation maps. Exploiting GGeM shows 0.1%p to 0.7%p performance boosts compared to the baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance for ViT-Base and ViT-Large models in ImageNet-1K classification task. Moreover, GGeM outperforms the existing pooling strategies on image retrieval and multi-modal representation learning tasks, demonstrating the superiority of GGeM for a variety of tasks. GGeM is a simple algorithm in that only a few lines of code are necessary for implementation.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) extracts the final representation from either class token or an average of all patch tokens, following the architecture of Transformer in Natural Language Processing (NLP) or Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in computer vision. However, studies for the best way of aggregating the patch tokens are still limited to average pooling, while widely-used pooling strategies, such as max and GeM pooling, can be considered. Despite their effectiveness, the existing pooling strategies do not consider the architecture of ViT and the channel-wise difference in the activation maps, aggregating the crucial and trivial channels with the same importance. In this paper, we present Group Generalized Mean (GGeM) pooling as a simple yet powerful pooling strategy for ViT. GGeM divides the channels into groups and computes GeM pooling with a shared pooling parameter per group. As ViT groups the channels via a multi-head attention mechanism, grouping the channels by GGeM leads to lower head-wise dependence while amplifying important channels on the activation maps. Exploiting GGeM shows 0.1%p to 0.7%p performance boosts compared to the baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance for ViT-Base and ViT-Large models in ImageNet-1K classification task. Moreover, GGeM outperforms the existing pooling strategies on image retrieval and multi-modal representation learning tasks, demonstrating the superiority of GGeM for a variety of tasks. GGeM is a simple algorithm in that only a few lines of code are necessary for implementation.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 遵循自然语言处理 (NLP) 中的 Transformer 或计算机视觉中的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的架构，从类标记或所有补丁标记的平均值中提取最终表示。然而，对聚合补丁令牌的最佳方式的研究仍然仅限于平均池化，而可以考虑广泛使用的池化策略，例如最大池化和GeM池化。尽管有效，现有的池化策略并没有考虑 ViT 的架构和激活图中通道间的差异，而是聚合了具有相同重要性的关键通道和琐碎通道。在本文中，我们提出了组广义均值（GGeM）池化作为 ViT 的一种简单但强大的池化策略。 GGeM 将通道分成组，并使用每组共享的池化参数来计算 GeM 池化。由于 ViT 通过多头注意力机制对通道进行分组，因此通过 GGeM 对通道进行分组可以降低头部依赖性，同时放大激活图上的重要通道。与基线相比，利用 GGeM 显示了 0.1%p 至 0.7%p 的性能提升，并在 ImageNet-1K 分类任务中为 ViT-Base 和 ViT-Large 模型实现了最先进的性能。此外，GGeM 在图像检索和多模态表示学习任务上优于现有的池化策略，展示了 GGeM 对于各种任务的优越性。 GGeM 是一种简单的算法，只需几行代码即可实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Group Generalized Mean (GGeM) 的池化策略，用于改进Vision Transformer (ViT) 的表示学习，通过分组通道并应用广义均值池化以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT模型在聚合patch token时仅依赖平均池化，未能考虑通道间差异及多头注意力机制的结构特性，导致重要通道信息被稀释。
AI.method: GGeM将通道按多头注意力机制分组，每组独立计算广义均值池化（GeM），通过共享组内参数增强关键通道激活，降低头间依赖。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类任务中，GGeM使ViT-Base和ViT-Large模型性能提升0.1%-0.7%，并在图像检索和多模态学习任务中优于现有池化方法。
AI.conclusion: GGeM通过简单且高效的分组池化策略，有效提升了ViT的表示能力，验证了其在多种视觉任务中的优越性与通用性。

authors_text: Zizhang Wu,Yuanzhu Gan,Xianzhi Li,Yunzhe Wu,Xiaoquan Wang,Tianhao Xu,Fan Wang
title: Surround-view Fisheye BEV-Perception for Valet Parking: Dataset, Baseline and Distortion-insensitive Multi-task Framework
title_zh: 用于代客泊车的环视鱼眼 BEV 感知：数据集、基线和失真不敏感的多任务框架
abstract: Surround-view fisheye perception under valet parking scenes is fundamental and crucial in autonomous driving. Environmental conditions in parking lots perform differently from the common public datasets, such as imperfect light and opacity, which substantially impacts on perception performance. Most existing networks based on public datasets may generalize suboptimal results on these valet parking scenes, also affected by the fisheye distortion. In this article, we introduce a new large-scale fisheye dataset called Fisheye Parking Dataset(FPD) to promote the research in dealing with diverse real-world surround-view parking cases. Notably, our compiled FPD exhibits excellent characteristics for different surround-view perception tasks. In addition, we also propose our real-time distortion-insensitive multi-task framework Fisheye Perception Network (FPNet), which improves the surround-view fisheye BEV perception by enhancing the fisheye distortion operation and multi-task lightweight designs. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach and the dataset's exceptional generalizability.
summary: Surround-view fisheye perception under valet parking scenes is fundamental and crucial in autonomous driving. Environmental conditions in parking lots perform differently from the common public datasets, such as imperfect light and opacity, which substantially impacts on perception performance. Most existing networks based on public datasets may generalize suboptimal results on these valet parking scenes, also affected by the fisheye distortion. In this article, we introduce a new large-scale fisheye dataset called Fisheye Parking Dataset(FPD) to promote the research in dealing with diverse real-world surround-view parking cases. Notably, our compiled FPD exhibits excellent characteristics for different surround-view perception tasks. In addition, we also propose our real-time distortion-insensitive multi-task framework Fisheye Perception Network (FPNet), which improves the surround-view fisheye BEV perception by enhancing the fisheye distortion operation and multi-task lightweight designs. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach and the dataset's exceptional generalizability.
abstract_zh: 代客泊车场景下的环视鱼眼感知是自动驾驶的基础和关键。停车场的环境条件与常见的公共数据集不同，例如不完美的光线和不透明度，这会严重影响感知性能。大多数基于公共数据集的现有网络可能会在这些代客泊车场景上概括出次优结果，这也受到鱼眼失真的影响。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的大规模鱼眼数据集，称为鱼眼停车数据集（FPD），以促进处理各种现实世界环视停车案例的研究。值得注意的是，我们编译的 FPD 对于不同的环视感知任务表现出优异的特性。此外，我们还提出了实时失真不敏感多任务框架鱼眼感知网络（FPNet），通过增强鱼眼失真操作和多任务轻量级设计来改善环视鱼眼BEV感知。大量的实验验证了我们方法的有效性和数据集卓越的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文针对代客泊车场景，提出鱼眼BEV感知方法，包含新数据集FPD和抗失真多任务框架FPNet。
AI.motivation: 现有基于公共数据集的模型在停车场场景因光照不足、遮挡及鱼眼失真导致感知效果不佳，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 构建大规模鱼眼停车场数据集FPD，并设计轻量级多任务框架FPNet以增强失真校正与多任务协同能力。
AI.result: 实验验证FPNet在BEV感知任务中表现优异，且FPD数据集展现出良好的模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集和框架有效解决了代客泊车场景下的鱼眼失真与环境复杂性挑战，提升感知性能。

search_text: Surround-view Fisheye BEV-Perception for Valet Parking: Dataset, Baseline and Distortion-insensitive Multi-task Framework 用于代客泊车的环视鱼眼 BEV 感知：数据集、基线和失真不敏感的多任务框架 Surround-view fisheye perception under valet parking scenes is fundamental and crucial in autonomous driving. Environmental conditions in parking lots perform differently from the common public datasets, such as imperfect light and opacity, which substantially impacts on perception performance. Most existing networks based on public datasets may generalize suboptimal results on these valet parking scenes, also affected by the fisheye distortion. In this article, we introduce a new large-scale fisheye dataset called Fisheye Parking Dataset(FPD) to promote the research in dealing with diverse real-world surround-view parking cases. Notably, our compiled FPD exhibits excellent characteristics for different surround-view perception tasks. In addition, we also propose our real-time distortion-insensitive multi-task framework Fisheye Perception Network (FPNet), which improves the surround-view fisheye BEV perception by enhancing the fisheye distortion operation and multi-task lightweight designs. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach and the dataset's exceptional generalizability. 代客泊车场景下的环视鱼眼感知是自动驾驶的基础和关键。停车场的环境条件与常见的公共数据集不同，例如不完美的光线和不透明度，这会严重影响感知性能。大多数基于公共数据集的现有网络可能会在这些代客泊车场景上概括出次优结果，这也受到鱼眼失真的影响。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的大规模鱼眼数据集，称为鱼眼停车数据集（FPD），以促进处理各种现实世界环视停车案例的研究。值得注意的是，我们编译的 FPD 对于不同的环视感知任务表现出优异的特性。此外，我们还提出了实时失真不敏感多任务框架鱼眼感知网络（FPNet），通过增强鱼眼失真操作和多任务轻量级设计来改善环视鱼眼BEV感知。大量的实验验证了我们方法的有效性和数据集卓越的通用性。 本文针对代客泊车场景，提出鱼眼BEV感知方法，包含新数据集FPD和抗失真多任务框架FPNet。 Zizhang Wu,Yuanzhu Gan,Xianzhi Li,Yunzhe Wu,Xiaoquan Wang,Tianhao Xu,Fan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yunshan Zhong,Lizhou You,Yuxin Zhang,Fei Chao,Yonghong Tian,Rongrong Ji
title: Shadow Removal by High-Quality Shadow Synthesis
title_zh: 通过高质量阴影合成去除阴影
abstract: Most shadow removal methods rely on the invasion of training images associated with laborious and lavish shadow region annotations, leading to the increasing popularity of shadow image synthesis. However, the poor performance also stems from these synthesized images since they are often shadow-inauthentic and details-impaired. In this paper, we present a novel generation framework, referred to as HQSS, for high-quality pseudo shadow image synthesis. The given image is first decoupled into a shadow region identity and a non-shadow region identity. HQSS employs a shadow feature encoder and a generator to synthesize pseudo images. Specifically, the encoder extracts the shadow feature of a region identity which is then paired with another region identity to serve as the generator input to synthesize a pseudo image. The pseudo image is expected to have the shadow feature as its input shadow feature and as well as a real-like image detail as its input region identity. To fulfill this goal, we design three learning objectives. When the shadow feature and input region identity are from the same region identity, we propose a self-reconstruction loss that guides the generator to reconstruct an identical pseudo image as its input. When the shadow feature and input region identity are from different identities, we introduce an inter-reconstruction loss and a cycle-reconstruction loss to make sure that shadow characteristics and detail information can be well retained in the synthesized images. Our HQSS is observed to outperform the state-of-the-art methods on ISTD dataset, Video Shadow Removal dataset, and SRD dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/zysxmu/HQSS.
summary: Most shadow removal methods rely on the invasion of training images associated with laborious and lavish shadow region annotations, leading to the increasing popularity of shadow image synthesis. However, the poor performance also stems from these synthesized images since they are often shadow-inauthentic and details-impaired. In this paper, we present a novel generation framework, referred to as HQSS, for high-quality pseudo shadow image synthesis. The given image is first decoupled into a shadow region identity and a non-shadow region identity. HQSS employs a shadow feature encoder and a generator to synthesize pseudo images. Specifically, the encoder extracts the shadow feature of a region identity which is then paired with another region identity to serve as the generator input to synthesize a pseudo image. The pseudo image is expected to have the shadow feature as its input shadow feature and as well as a real-like image detail as its input region identity. To fulfill this goal, we design three learning objectives. When the shadow feature and input region identity are from the same region identity, we propose a self-reconstruction loss that guides the generator to reconstruct an identical pseudo image as its input. When the shadow feature and input region identity are from different identities, we introduce an inter-reconstruction loss and a cycle-reconstruction loss to make sure that shadow characteristics and detail information can be well retained in the synthesized images. Our HQSS is observed to outperform the state-of-the-art methods on ISTD dataset, Video Shadow Removal dataset, and SRD dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/zysxmu/HQSS.
abstract_zh: 大多数阴影去除方法依赖于与费力且大量的阴影区域注释相关的训练图像的侵入，导致阴影图像合成的日益流行。然而，性能不佳也源于这些合成图像，因为它们通常是阴影不真实且细节受损。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的生成框架，称为 HQSS，用于高质量伪阴影图像合成。给定图像首先被解耦为阴影区域标识和非阴影区域标识。 HQSS 采用阴影特征编码器和生成器来合成伪图像。具体来说，编码器提取一个区域标识的阴影特征，然后将其与另一个区域标识配对，作为生成器输入来合成伪图像。伪图像预计将阴影特征作为其输入阴影特征，并以类似真实的图像细节作为其输入区域标识。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了三个学习目标。当阴影特征和输入区域标识来自相同的区域标识时，我们提出了自重建损失，引导生成器重建相同的伪图像作为其输入。当阴影特征和输入区域身份来自不同身份时，我们引入互重建损失和循环重建损失，以确保阴影特征和细节信息可以很好地保留在合成图像中。据观察，我们的 HQSS 在 ISTD 数据集、视频阴影去除数据集和 SRD 数据集上优于最先进的方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/zysxmu/HQSS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HQSS的高质量伪阴影图像合成框架，用于改进阴影去除任务。
AI.motivation: 现有阴影去除方法依赖繁琐的标注数据，而合成阴影图像存在真实性不足和细节缺失的问题，亟需更高质量的合成方法。
AI.method: 通过将输入图像解耦为阴影区域和非阴影区域身份，利用阴影特征编码器和生成器合成伪图像，并设计自重建损失、跨区域重建损失和循环重建损失三重目标优化合成效果。
AI.result: 在ISTD、Video Shadow Removal和SRD数据集上优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: HQSS通过多目标学习有效保留阴影特征与细节信息，为阴影去除任务提供了高质量的合成数据解决方案。

authors_text: Ashish Hooda,Andrey Labunets,Tadayoshi Kohno,Earlence Fernandes
title: Re-purposing Perceptual Hashing based Client Side Scanning for Physical Surveillance
title_zh: 重新利用基于感知哈希的客户端扫描进行物理监控
abstract: Content scanning systems employ perceptual hashing algorithms to scan user content for illegal material, such as child pornography or terrorist recruitment flyers. Perceptual hashing algorithms help determine whether two images are visually similar while preserving the privacy of the input images. Several efforts from industry and academia propose to conduct content scanning on client devices such as smartphones due to the impending roll out of end-to-end encryption that will make server-side content scanning difficult. However, these proposals have met with strong criticism because of the potential for the technology to be misused and re-purposed. Our work informs this conversation by experimentally characterizing the potential for one type of misuse -- attackers manipulating the content scanning system to perform physical surveillance on target locations. Our contributions are threefold: (1) we offer a definition of physical surveillance in the context of client-side image scanning systems; (2) we experimentally characterize this risk and create a surveillance algorithm that achieves physical surveillance rates of >40% by poisoning 5% of the perceptual hash database; (3) we experimentally study the trade-off between the robustness of client-side image scanning systems and surveillance, showing that more robust detection of illegal material leads to increased potential for physical surveillance.
summary: Content scanning systems employ perceptual hashing algorithms to scan user content for illegal material, such as child pornography or terrorist recruitment flyers. Perceptual hashing algorithms help determine whether two images are visually similar while preserving the privacy of the input images. Several efforts from industry and academia propose to conduct content scanning on client devices such as smartphones due to the impending roll out of end-to-end encryption that will make server-side content scanning difficult. However, these proposals have met with strong criticism because of the potential for the technology to be misused and re-purposed. Our work informs this conversation by experimentally characterizing the potential for one type of misuse -- attackers manipulating the content scanning system to perform physical surveillance on target locations. Our contributions are threefold: (1) we offer a definition of physical surveillance in the context of client-side image scanning systems; (2) we experimentally characterize this risk and create a surveillance algorithm that achieves physical surveillance rates of >40% by poisoning 5% of the perceptual hash database; (3) we experimentally study the trade-off between the robustness of client-side image scanning systems and surveillance, showing that more robust detection of illegal material leads to increased potential for physical surveillance.
abstract_zh: 内容扫描系统采用感知哈希算法来扫描用户内容中是否存在非法材料，例如儿童色情内容或恐怖分子招募传单。感知哈希算法有助于确定两个图像在视觉上是否相似，同时保护输入图像的隐私。业界和学术界的一些努力建议在智能手机等客户端设备上进行内容扫描，因为即将推出的端到端加密将使服务器端内容扫描变得困难。然而，这些提议遭到了强烈批评，因为该技术可能被滥用和重新利用。我们的工作通过实验描述一种滥用的可能性，即攻击者操纵内容扫描系统对目标位置进行物理监视，从而为这一对话提供信息。我们的贡献有三个：（1）我们在客户端图像扫描系统的背景下提供了物理监控的定义； (2) 我们通过实验描述了这种风险，并创建了一种监视算法，通过毒害 5% 的感知哈希数据库，实现了 >40% 的物理监视率； (3) 我们通过实验研究了客户端图像扫描系统的鲁棒性与监视之间的权衡，结果表明，对非法材料的更强大的检测会增加物理监视的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于感知哈希的客户端扫描技术被滥用于物理监控的可能性，并提出了相应的实验分析。
AI.motivation: 随着端到端加密的普及，服务器端内容扫描面临挑战，客户端扫描技术被提议用于检测非法内容。然而该技术可能被滥用，引发对隐私和监控风险的担忧。
AI.method: 定义物理监控在客户端图像扫描系统中的概念，通过污染感知哈希数据库（5%污染率）实现物理监控，并实验分析检测系统鲁棒性与监控能力的权衡关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需污染5%的感知哈希数据库即可实现超过40%的物理监控成功率，且系统检测非法内容的鲁棒性越强，潜在监控风险越高。
AI.conclusion: 客户端扫描技术虽能提升非法内容检测能力，但其设计本身存在被滥用于物理监控的风险，需在安全与隐私保护间寻求平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了基于感知哈希的客户端扫描技术被滥用于物理监控的可能性，并提出了相应的实验分析。
